516	class Gemma4DecoderLayer(nn.Module):
517	    def __init__(
518	        self,
519	        layer_id: int,
520	        config: PretrainedConfig,
521	        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,
522	        prefix: str = "",
523	    ) -> None:
524	        super().__init__()
525	        self.hidden_size = config.hidden_size
526	        self.hidden_size_per_layer_input = (
527	            getattr(config, "hidden_size_per_layer_input", None) or 0
528	        )
529	
530	        self.layer_id = layer_id
531	
532	        # Gemma 4 uses different head dimensions for sliding vs full attention
533	        layer_type = config.layer_types[layer_id]
534	        self.is_full_attention = layer_type == "full_attention"
535	        if self.is_full_attention:
536	            head_dim = config.head_dim  # following sglang naming
537	        else:
538	            head_dim = getattr(config, "swa_head_dim", config.head_dim)
539	
540	        self.self_attn = Gemma4Attention(
541	            layer_id=layer_id,
542	            config=config,
543	            max_position_embeddings=config.max_position_embeddings,
544	            head_dim=head_dim,
545	            quant_config=quant_config,
546	            prefix=add_prefix("self_attn", prefix),
547	        )
548	
549	        first_kv_shared_layer_idx = config.num_hidden_layers - getattr(
550	            config, "num_kv_shared_layers", 0
551	        )
552	        is_kv_shared_layer = self.layer_id >= first_kv_shared_layer_idx > 0
553	        use_double_wide_mlp = (
554	            getattr(config, "use_double_wide_mlp", False) and is_kv_shared_layer
555	        )
556	        layer_intermediate_size = config.intermediate_size * (
557	            2 if use_double_wide_mlp else 1
558	        )
559	
560	        self.mlp = Gemma4MLP(
561	            hidden_size=self.hidden_size,
562	            intermediate_size=layer_intermediate_size,
563	            hidden_activation=config.hidden_activation,
564	            quant_config=quant_config,
565	            prefix=add_prefix("mlp", prefix),
566	        )
567	
568	        self.input_layernorm = RMSNorm(config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps)
569	        self.post_attention_layernorm = RMSNorm(
570	            config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps
571	        )
572	        self.pre_feedforward_layernorm = RMSNorm(
573	            config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps
574	        )
575	        self.post_feedforward_layernorm = RMSNorm(
576	            config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps
577	        )
578	
579	        # Per-Layer Embedding (PLE) components — present in each decoder layer
580	        if self.hidden_size_per_layer_input > 0:
581	            # Gate: projects hidden_states → per-layer dim for gating
582	            self.per_layer_input_gate = ReplicatedLinear(
583	                self.hidden_size,
584	                self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,
585	                bias=False,
586	                quant_config=quant_config,
587	                prefix=add_prefix("per_layer_input_gate", prefix),
588	            )
589	            # Projection: projects gated per-layer input back → hidden size
590	            self.per_layer_projection = ReplicatedLinear(
591	                self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,
592	                self.hidden_size,
593	                bias=False,
594	                quant_config=quant_config,
595	                prefix=add_prefix("per_layer_projection", prefix),
596	            )
597	            self.post_per_layer_input_norm = Gemma4RMSNorm(
598	                config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps
599	            )
600	        else:
601	            self.per_layer_input_gate = None
602	            self.per_layer_projection = None
603	            self.post_per_layer_input_norm = None
604	
605	        # Parallel MoE
606	        self.enable_moe_block = getattr(config, "enable_moe_block", False)
607	        if self.enable_moe_block:
608	            self.router = Gemma4Router(
609	                config,
610	                quant_config=quant_config,
611	                prefix=add_prefix("router", prefix),
612	            )
613	            self.moe = Gemma4MoE(
614	                hidden_size=self.hidden_size,
615	                layer_id=layer_id,
616	                config=config,
617	                quant_config=quant_config,
618	                prefix=add_prefix("moe", prefix),
619	            )
620	
621	            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1 = RMSNorm(
622	                config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps
623	            )
624	            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2 = RMSNorm(
625	                config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps
626	            )
627	            self.pre_feedforward_layernorm_2 = RMSNorm(
628	                config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps
629	            )
630	        else:
631	            self.router = None
632	            self.moe = None
633	            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1 = None
634	            self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2 = None
635	            self.pre_feedforward_layernorm_2 = None
636	
637	        self.register_buffer("layer_scalar", torch.ones(1), persistent=True)
638	        self.has_ple = self.hidden_size_per_layer_input > 0
639	        self.prefix = prefix
640	
641	    def forward(
642	        self,
643	        positions: torch.Tensor,
644	        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
645	        per_layer_input: torch.Tensor,
646	        forward_batch: ForwardBatch,
647	        **kwargs,
648	    ) -> tuple[
649	        torch.FloatTensor, Optional[tuple[torch.FloatTensor, torch.FloatTensor]]
650	    ]:
651	        # Gemma4 residual pattern following JAX implementation:
652	        # 1. input_norm(x) -> attn -> post_attn_norm -> ADD residual
653	        # 2. pre_ff_norm -> mlp -> post_ff_norm -> ADD residual
654	        #
655	        # Optimization: fuse "post_attn_norm(h) + residual; pre_ff_norm(...)"
656	        # into "post_attn_norm(h); pre_ff_norm(h, residual)" using
657	        # gemma_fused_add_rmsnorm which computes:
658	        #   residual = h + residual (in-place)
659	        #   h = gemma_norm(residual)
660	        residual = hidden_states
661	
662	        # Apply input layernorm
663	        hidden_states = self.input_layernorm(hidden_states)
664	        hidden_states = self.self_attn(
665	            positions=positions,
666	            hidden_states=hidden_states,
667	            forward_batch=forward_batch,
668	        )
669	        hidden_states = self.post_attention_layernorm(hidden_states)
670	
671	        if self.enable_moe_block:
672	            # Fuse: hidden_states + residual -> residual; pre_ff_norm(residual) -> hidden_states
673	            # Also need raw (unfused) residual for router and pre_ff_norm_2
674	            hidden_states, residual = self.pre_feedforward_layernorm(
675	                hidden_states, residual
676	            )
677	            # For MoE: router and pre_ff_norm_2 need the unfused residual
678	            # (which is now updated to post_attn_out + old_residual)
679	            moe_input = residual
680	
681	            # Dense MLP branch
682	            hidden_states_1 = self.mlp(hidden_states)
683	
684	            # MoE branch: router sees residual (= post_attn_out + old_residual)
685	            router_logits = self.router(moe_input)
686	            hidden_states_2 = self.pre_feedforward_layernorm_2(moe_input)
687	            hidden_states_2 = self.moe(hidden_states_2, router_logits)
688	
689	            # Fused: (rmsnorm(rmsnorm(h1,w1) + rmsnorm(h2,w2), w3) + residual) * scalar
690	            if (
691	                not self.has_ple
692	                and (hidden_states_1.is_cuda or hidden_states_1.is_xpu)
693	                and hidden_states_1.dim() == 2
694	            ):
695	                norm1 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1
696	                norm2 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2
697	                norm3 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm
698	                hidden_states = gemma_dual_rmsnorm_residual_scalar(
699	                    hidden_states_1,
700	                    norm1.weight.data,
701	                    hidden_states_2,
702	                    norm2.weight.data,
703	                    norm3.weight.data,
704	                    residual,
705	                    self.layer_scalar,
706	                    norm1.variance_epsilon,
707	                    norm2.variance_epsilon,
708	                    norm3.variance_epsilon,
709	                )
710	                return hidden_states, None
711	
712	            hidden_states_1 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_1(hidden_states_1)
713	            hidden_states_2 = self.post_feedforward_layernorm_2(hidden_states_2)
714	
715	            # Combine branches
716	            hidden_states = hidden_states_1 + hidden_states_2
717	        else:
718	            # Fuse: hidden_states + residual -> residual; pre_ff_norm(residual) -> hidden_states
719	            hidden_states, residual = self.pre_feedforward_layernorm(
720	                hidden_states, residual
721	            )
722	            hidden_states = self.mlp(hidden_states)
723	
724	        if (
725	            not self.has_ple
726	            and self.moe is None
727	            and (hidden_states.is_cuda or hidden_states.is_xpu)
728	            and hidden_states.dim() == 2
729	        ):
730	            # Fused: (post_ff_norm(h) + residual) * layer_scalar in one kernel
731	            norm = self.post_feedforward_layernorm
732	            hidden_states = gemma_rmsnorm_residual_scalar(
733	                hidden_states,
734	                norm.weight.data,
735	                residual,
736	                self.layer_scalar,
737	                norm.variance_epsilon,
738	            )
739	        else:
740	            hidden_states = self.post_feedforward_layernorm(hidden_states)
741	            hidden_states = hidden_states + residual
742	
743	            if self.has_ple and per_layer_input is not None:
744	                gate, _ = self.per_layer_input_gate(hidden_states)
745	                gate = torch.nn.functional.gelu(gate, approximate="tanh")
746	                gated_per_layer = gate * per_layer_input
747	                per_layer_contribution, _ = self.per_layer_projection(gated_per_layer)
748	                per_layer_contribution = self.post_per_layer_input_norm(
749	                    per_layer_contribution
750	                )
751	                hidden_states = hidden_states + per_layer_contribution
752	
753	            hidden_states = hidden_states * self.layer_scalar
754	        return hidden_states, None
755

757	class Gemma4TextModel(PreTrainedModel):
758	    def __init__(
759	        self,
760	        config: Gemma4TextConfig,
761	        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,
762	        prefix: str = "",
763	    ) -> None:
764	        super().__init__(config=config)
765	        self.config = config
766	        self.quant_config = quant_config
767	        self.vocab_size = config.vocab_size
768	        self.padding_idx = getattr(config, "pad_token_id", None)
769	        self.pp_group = get_pp_group()
770	
771	        # Token / per-layer embedding tables and the per-layer projection only
772	        # produce activations consumed at the model entry, so they live on the
773	        # first PP rank only.  Other ranks substitute PPMissingLayer so that
774	        # parameter iteration still works (load_weights skips them explicitly).
775	        self.hidden_size = config.hidden_size
776	        self.hidden_size_per_layer_input = (
777	            getattr(config, "hidden_size_per_layer_input", None) or 0
778	        )
779	        self.vocab_size_per_layer_input = (
780	            getattr(config, "vocab_size_per_layer_input", None) or config.vocab_size
781	        )
782	
783	        # PLE-enabled variants (E2B/E4B) forward `per_layer_inputs` through
784	        # the PP proxy, but cuda_graph_runner hardcodes the proxy schema to
785	        # {hidden_states, residual} and silently drops any extra keys at
786	        # replay time.  Empirically this corrupts E4B output to garbage on
787	        # non-first PP ranks (eager path produces correct output and
788	        # GSM8K ~0.92, cuda-graph path emits token soup).  Refuse the
789	        # combination until the runner becomes schema-aware; users can run
790	        # PP + PLE eagerly with --disable-cuda-graph.
791	        if self.pp_group.world_size > 1 and self.hidden_size_per_layer_input > 0:
792	            sa = get_global_server_args()
793	            if sa is not None and not sa.disable_cuda_graph:
794	                raise ValueError(
795	                    "Pipeline parallelism is currently incompatible with "
796	                    "per-layer-input (PLE) embeddings under CUDA graph: "
797	                    "the runner's PP proxy schema is hardcoded to "
798	                    "{hidden_states, residual} and silently drops "
799	                    "per_layer_inputs, corrupting per-layer contributions on "
800	                    "non-first PP ranks. Workarounds: (a) pass "
801	                    "--disable-cuda-graph to fall back to eager replay, or "
802	                    "(b) use tensor parallelism (--tp-size) instead of PP."
803	                )
804	
805	        if self.pp_group.is_first_rank:
806	            self.embed_tokens = Gemma4TextScaledWordEmbedding(
807	                config.vocab_size,
808	                config.hidden_size,
809	                self.padding_idx,
810	                embed_scale=self.config.hidden_size**0.5,  # embedded normalizer
811	            )
812	        else:
813	            self.embed_tokens = PPMissingLayer()
814	
815	        if (
816	            self.pp_group.is_first_rank
817	            and self.hidden_size_per_layer_input
818	            and self.hidden_size_per_layer_input > 0
819	        ):
820	            self.embed_tokens_per_layer = Gemma4TextScaledWordEmbedding(
821	                self.vocab_size_per_layer_input,
822	                config.num_hidden_layers * self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,
823	                self.padding_idx,
824	                embed_scale=self.hidden_size_per_layer_input**0.5,
825	            )
826	
827	            self.per_layer_model_projection = ReplicatedLinear(
828	                self.hidden_size,
829	                config.num_hidden_layers * self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,
830	                bias=False,
831	                quant_config=quant_config,
832	                prefix=add_prefix("per_layer_model_projection", prefix),
833	            )
834	
835	            self.per_layer_projection_norm = RMSNorm(
836	                self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,
837	                config.rms_norm_eps,
838	            )
839	            self.per_layer_input_scale = torch.rsqrt(torch.tensor(2.0))
840	            self.per_layer_projection_scale = torch.tensor(
841	                config.hidden_size**-0.5,
842	            )
843	        else:
844	            self.embed_tokens_per_layer = None
845	            self.per_layer_model_projection = None
846	            self.per_layer_projection_norm = None
847	            self.per_layer_input_scale = None
848	            self.per_layer_projection_scale = None
849	
850	        self.layers, self.start_layer, self.end_layer = make_layers(
851	            config.num_hidden_layers,
852	            lambda idx, prefix: Gemma4DecoderLayer(
853	                layer_id=idx,
854	                config=config,
855	                quant_config=quant_config,
856	                prefix=prefix,
857	            ),
858	            pp_rank=self.pp_group.rank_in_group,
859	            pp_size=self.pp_group.world_size,
860	            prefix=add_prefix("layers", prefix),
861	        )
862	
863	        if self.pp_group.is_last_rank:
864	            self.norm = RMSNorm(config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps)
865	        else:
866	            self.norm = PPMissingLayer()
867	        self.layers_to_capture = []
868	        self.post_init()
869	
870	    def get_input_embeddings(self) -> nn.Embedding:
871	        return self.embed_tokens
872	
873	    def dtype(self) -> torch.dtype:
874	        return next(self.parameters()).dtype
875	
876	    def get_per_layer_inputs(self, input_ids: torch.LongTensor) -> torch.Tensor:
877	        if self.embed_tokens_per_layer is None:
878	            return None
879	
880	        # Handle out-of-vocab tokens for PLE (vocab_size_per_layer_input may
881	        # be smaller than the main vocab_size). Following Gemma3n pattern.
882	        per_layer_inputs_mask = torch.logical_and(
883	            input_ids >= 0,
884	            input_ids < self.vocab_size_per_layer_input,
885	        )
886	        per_layer_inputs_tokens = torch.where(
887	            per_layer_inputs_mask, input_ids, torch.zeros_like(input_ids)
888	        )
889	
890	        # Get packed per-layer embeddings: (num_tokens, total_ple_dim)
891	        per_layer_embeds = self.embed_tokens_per_layer(per_layer_inputs_tokens)
892	
893	        # Apply embed_scale (sqrt of per-layer hidden dim)
894	        # Already done in embedding layer
895	        # per_layer_embeds = per_layer_embeds * self.embed_scale_per_layer
896	
897	        # Reshape to (num_tokens, num_layers, hidden_size_per_layer_input)
898	        per_layer_embeds = per_layer_embeds.reshape(
899	            *input_ids.shape,
900	            self.config.num_hidden_layers,
901	            self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,
902	        )
903	        return per_layer_embeds
904	
905	    def project_per_layer_inputs(
906	        self,
907	        inputs_embeds: torch.Tensor,
908	        per_layer_inputs: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
909	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
910	        """Project inputs_embeds and combine with per_layer_inputs.
911	
912	        Following HF/Gemma3n reference:
913	        1. Project inputs_embeds: hidden_size → total_ple_dim
914	        2. Scale by hidden_size^{-0.5} (Gemma4ScaledLinear w_scale)
915	        3. Reshape to (num_tokens, num_layers, per_layer_dim)
916	        4. Normalize with per_layer_projection_norm
917	        5. Combine: (projection + per_layer_inputs) * 1/sqrt(2)
918	        """
919	        if self.per_layer_model_projection is None:
920	            return None
921	
922	        # Project from hidden_size to total_ple_dim
923	        per_layer_projection, _ = self.per_layer_model_projection(inputs_embeds)
924	
925	        # Apply w_scale (HF: Gemma4ScaledLinear with w_scale=hidden_size^{-0.5})
926	        per_layer_projection = per_layer_projection * self.per_layer_projection_scale
927	
928	        # Reshape to (num_tokens, num_layers, hidden_size_per_layer_input)
929	        per_layer_projection = per_layer_projection.reshape(
930	            *inputs_embeds.shape[:-1],
931	            self.config.num_hidden_layers,
932	            self.hidden_size_per_layer_input,
933	        )
934	
935	        # Normalize
936	        per_layer_projection = self.per_layer_projection_norm(per_layer_projection)
937	
938	        if per_layer_inputs is None:
939	            return per_layer_projection
940	
941	        # Combine: (projection + per_layer_inputs) * scale
942	        return (per_layer_projection + per_layer_inputs) * self.per_layer_input_scale
943	
944	    def forward(
945	        self,
946	        input_ids: torch.Tensor,
947	        positions: torch.Tensor,
948	        forward_batch: ForwardBatch,
949	        input_embeds: torch.Tensor = None,
950	        per_layer_inputs: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
951	        pp_proxy_tensors: Optional[PPProxyTensors] = None,
952	        **kwargs,
953	    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, List[torch.Tensor]], PPProxyTensors]:
954	        if self.pp_group.is_first_rank:
955	            if (input_ids is None) ^ (input_embeds is not None):
956	                raise ValueError(
957	                    "You must specify exactly one of input_ids or inputs_embeds"
958	                )
959	
960	            if input_ids is not None:
961	                input_embeds = self.embed_tokens(input_ids)
962	                per_layer_inputs = self.get_per_layer_inputs(input_ids)
963	            per_layer_inputs = self.project_per_layer_inputs(
964	                input_embeds, per_layer_inputs
965	            )
966	            hidden_states = input_embeds
967	        else:
968	            assert (
969	                pp_proxy_tensors is not None
970	            ), "pp_proxy_tensors is required on non-first PP ranks"
971	            hidden_states = pp_proxy_tensors["hidden_states"]
972	            # PLE inputs were computed on rank 0 and forwarded along the
973	            # pipeline; non-PLE models simply omit the key.
974	            per_layer_inputs = pp_proxy_tensors.tensors.get("per_layer_inputs", None)
975	
976	        aux_hidden_states = []
977	        num_layers = self.config.num_hidden_layers
978	
979	        for layer_idx in range(self.start_layer, self.end_layer):
980	            if layer_idx in self.layers_to_capture:
981	                aux_hidden_states.append(hidden_states)
982	
983	            if per_layer_inputs is not None:
984	                per_layer_input = per_layer_inputs[:, layer_idx, :]
985	            else:
986	                per_layer_input = None
987	            layer = self.layers[layer_idx]
988	            layer_outputs = layer(
989	                positions=positions,
990	                hidden_states=hidden_states,
991	                per_layer_input=per_layer_input,
992	                forward_batch=forward_batch,
993	                **kwargs,
994	            )
995	            hidden_states = layer_outputs[0]
996	            # Gemma4DecoderLayer.forward always returns (hidden_states, None);
997	            # the residual is fused inside the layer, so nothing to thread.
998	
999	        if not self.pp_group.is_last_rank:
1000	            # cuda_graph_runner allocates a fixed PP-proxy schema of
1001	            # {hidden_states, residual} and KeyErrors if a model omits a key.
1002	            # Gemma4 fuses the residual inside each layer so we don't have a
1003	            # standalone tensor to forward; emit a zero placeholder instead so
1004	            # graph replay can still copy it.  The receiving stage never reads
1005	            # this key.
1006	            proxy = {
1007	                "hidden_states": hidden_states,
1008	                "residual": torch.zeros_like(hidden_states),
1009	            }
1010	            if per_layer_inputs is not None:
1011	                proxy["per_layer_inputs"] = per_layer_inputs
1012	            return PPProxyTensors(proxy)
1013	
1014	        # Capture the output of the last layer if requested.
1015	        # layers_to_capture uses +1 offset, so num_layers means
1016	        # "output of the last layer" which is only available after the loop.
1017	        if num_layers in self.layers_to_capture:
1018	            aux_hidden_states.append(hidden_states)
1019	
1020	        hidden_states = self.norm(hidden_states)
1021	
1022	        if len(aux_hidden_states) == 0:
1023	            return hidden_states
1024	
1025	        return hidden_states, aux_hidden_states

1070	    def __init__(
1071	        self,

1074	        prefix: str = "",

1079	        self.quant_config = quant_config

1083	        )
1084	        self.logits_processor = LogitsProcessor(config)
1085	
1086	        # tie_word_embeddings ties lm_head to embed_tokens, but with PP those
1087	        # tensors live on opposite ranks (first vs last).  In the PP > 1 case
1088	        # we materialize a real ParallelLMHead on the last rank and route the
1089	        # checkpoint's embed_tokens.weight into it during load_weights.
1090	        if self.pp_group.world_size == 1 and self.config.tie_word_embeddings:
1091	            self.lm_head = self.model.embed_tokens
1092	        elif self.pp_group.is_last_rank:
1093	            self.lm_head = ParallelLMHead(
1094	                config.vocab_size,
1095	                config.hidden_size,
1096	                quant_config=quant_config,
1097	                prefix=add_prefix("lm_head", prefix),
1098	            )
1099	        else:
1100	            self.lm_head = PPMissingLayer()
1101	
1102	        self.capture_aux_hidden_states = False
1103	        self.post_init()

1105	    def tie_weights(self, *args, **kwargs):
1106	        # HF's PreTrainedModel.tie_weights uses ``_tied_weights_keys`` to bind
1107	        # ``lm_head.weight`` to ``model.embed_tokens.weight``.  Under PP those
1108	        # tensors live on different ranks (embed on first, head on last) and
1109	        # the missing side is a PPMissingLayer with no ``weight`` attribute,
1110	        # which makes the default tie_weights crash.  load_weights routes the
1111	        # checkpoint embedding into lm_head explicitly, so the tie is a no-op
1112	        # here when PP is active.
1113	        if self.pp_group.world_size > 1:

1159	            # `hidden_states` here is actually a PPProxyTensors handed off to
1160	            # the next stage; logits processing only happens on the last rank.

1163	        aux_hidden_states = None

1171	    def _get_k_eq_v_layers(self) -> set:
1172	        """Return set of layer indices where attention_k_eq_v applies (full-attention layers)."""
1173	        if not getattr(self.config, "attention_k_eq_v", False):
1174	            return set()
1175	        return {
1176	            i for i, lt in enumerate(self.config.layer_types) if lt == "full_attention"
1177	        }

1179	    def load_weights(self, weights: Iterable[Tuple[str, torch.Tensor]]):
1180	        stacked_params_mapping = [
1181	            # (param_name, shard_name, shard_id)
1182	            ("qkv_proj", "q_proj", "q"),
1183	            ("qkv_proj", "k_proj", "k"),
1184	            ("qkv_proj", "v_proj", "v"),
1185	            ("gate_up_proj", "gate_proj", 0),
1186	            ("gate_up_proj", "up_proj", 1),
1187	        ]
1188	
1189	        fused_expert_params_mapping = [
1190	            # (param_name, ckpt_weight_name, shard_ids)
1191	            # gate_up_proj is fused [E, 2*I, H] — chunk into w1 (gate) + w3 (up)
1192	            ("experts.w13_weight", "experts.gate_up_proj", ("w1", "w3")),
1193	            ("experts.w2_weight", "experts.down_proj", ("w2",)),
1194	        ]
1195	        # Dense subclasses (e.g. the Gemma4 MTP assistant) reuse this.
1196	        num_experts = getattr(self.config, "num_experts", None) or 0
1197	
1198	        # Per-expert checkpoint format used by compressed-tensors / FP8
1199	        # (e.g. RedHatAI/*-FP8-Dynamic) and by ModelOpt NVFP4
1200	        # (e.g. nvidia/Gemma-4-*-NVFP4). Each expert is stored as a
1201	        # separate key with shape (out, in):
1202	        #   experts.<id>.{gate,up,down}_proj.{weight,weight_scale,
1203	        #                                     weight_scale_2,input_scale}
1204	        # `make_expert_params_mapping` emits tuples whose `weight_name` ends
1205	        # in a trailing dot, so the standard `name.replace(weight_name,
1206	        # param_name)` collapses every suffix uniformly to the fused
1207	        # FusedMoE params (experts.w13_*, experts.w2_*).
1208	        per_expert_params_mapping = (
1209	            FusedMoE.make_expert_params_mapping(
1210	                ckpt_gate_proj_name="gate_proj",
1211	                ckpt_down_proj_name="down_proj",
1212	                ckpt_up_proj_name="up_proj",
1213	                num_experts=num_experts,
1214	            )
1215	            if num_experts
1216	            else []
1217	        )
1218	
1219	        k_eq_v_layers = self._get_k_eq_v_layers()
1220	
1221	        params_dict = dict(self.named_parameters())
1222	        params_dict.update(dict(self.named_buffers()))
1223	        non_persistent_buffers: Set[str] = set()
1224	        for mod_name, mod in self.named_modules():
1225	            for buf_name in getattr(mod, "_non_persistent_buffers_set", set()):
1226	                full = f"{mod_name}.{buf_name}" if mod_name else buf_name
1227	                non_persistent_buffers.add(full)
1228	
1229	        loaded_params: Set[str] = set()
1230	        for name, loaded_weight in weights:
1231	            name = name.replace("model.language_model.", "model.")
1232	
1233	            # HF has router.per_expert_scale and experts.* on the decoder layer;
1234	            # remap into our moe.* subtree since Gemma4MoE owns both.
1235	            name = name.replace(".router.per_expert_scale", ".moe.per_expert_scale")
1236	            if ".experts." in name and ".moe.experts." not in name:
1237	                name = name.replace(".experts.", ".moe.experts.")
1238	
1239	            if pp_filter_load_weight(
1240	                name,
1241	                loaded_weight,
1242	                pp_group=self.pp_group,
1243	                start_layer=self.model.start_layer,
1244	                end_layer=self.model.end_layer,
1245	                params_dict=params_dict,
1246	                loaded_params=loaded_params,
1247	                tie_word_embeddings=self.config.tie_word_embeddings,
1248	                embed_weight_name="model.embed_tokens.weight",
1249	                first_rank_only_patterns=(
1250	                    "embed_tokens",
1251	                    "per_layer_model_projection",
1252	                    "per_layer_projection_norm",
1253	                ),
1254	                last_rank_only_prefixes=("model.norm.", "lm_head."),
1255	            ):
1256	                continue
1257	
1258	            # attention_k_eq_v: full-attention layers have no v_proj in the
1259	            # checkpoint (K and V share weights).  When we see a k_proj weight
1260	            # for one of these layers, load it into both the "k" and "v" shards
1261	            # of the fused QKV so the forward produces v_raw == k_raw.
1262	            should_dup_k_to_v = (
1263	                ".k_proj." in name

1270	            # which would false-match the stacked dense MLP mapping).
1271	            orig_name = name
1272	
1273	            # 1) Per-expert checkpoint layout (compressed-tensors FP8 like
1274	            #    RedHatAI/*-FP8-Dynamic, ModelOpt NVFP4 like
1275	            #    nvidia/Gemma-4-*-NVFP4): experts.<id>.{gate,up,down}_proj.*
1276	            #    The trailing dot in `weight_name` lets a single mapping fold
1277	            #    weight, weight_scale, weight_scale_2, and input_scale into
1278	            #    their corresponding fused FusedMoE params (experts.w13_*,
1279	            #    experts.w2_*).
1280	            for (
1281	                param_name,
1282	                weight_name,
1283	                expert_id,
1284	                shard_id,
1285	            ) in per_expert_params_mapping:
1286	                if weight_name not in orig_name:
1287	                    continue
1288	                name = orig_name.replace(weight_name, param_name)
1289	                if name not in params_dict:
1290	                    continue
1291	                param = params_dict[name]
1292	                weight_loader = param.weight_loader
1293	                weight_loader(
1294	                    param,
1295	                    loaded_weight,
1296	                    name,
1297	                    shard_id=shard_id,
1298	                    expert_id=expert_id,
1299	                )
1300	                loaded_params.add(name)
1301	                break
1302	            else:
1303	                # 2) BF16 fused checkpoint layout: experts.gate_up_proj is a
1304	                #    [E, 2*I, H] tensor that needs per-expert chunking into
1305	                #    w1 (gate) and w3 (up).
1306	                for param_name, weight_name, shard_ids in fused_expert_params_mapping:
1307	                    name = orig_name
1308	                    if weight_name not in name:
1309	                        continue
1310	                    name = name.replace(weight_name, param_name)
1311	                    if name not in params_dict:
1312	                        continue
1313	                    param = params_dict[name]
1314	                    weight_loader = param.weight_loader
1315	                    for i in range(num_experts):
1316	                        chunks = loaded_weight[i].chunk(len(shard_ids), dim=0)
1317	                        for chunk, sid in zip(chunks, shard_ids):

1320	                    break
1321	                else:
1322	                    for param_name, weight_name, shard_id in stacked_params_mapping:
1323	                        name = orig_name

1327	                        if name not in params_dict:

1348	                        )

1351	        unloaded_params = params_dict.keys() - loaded_params
1352	        if unloaded_params:
1353	            param_names = set(dict(self.named_parameters()).keys())
1354	            buckets = {
1355	                logging.WARNING: (
1356	                    "Some weights are not initialized from checkpoints",
1357	                    lambda p: p in param_names,
1358	                ),
1359	                logging.INFO: (
1360	                    "Persistent buffers not in checkpoint (using default init)",
1361	                    lambda p: p not in param_names and p not in non_persistent_buffers,
1362	                ),
1363	                logging.DEBUG: (
1364	                    "Non-persistent buffers not in checkpoint (expected)",
1365	                    lambda p: p in non_persistent_buffers,
1366	                ),
1367	            }
1368	            for level, (msg, pred) in buckets.items():
1369	                names = sorted(p for p in unloaded_params if pred(p))
1370	                if names:
1371	                    logger.log(level, "%s: %s", msg, names)
1372	        return loaded_params

1374	    def _shard_weight(self, weight: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
1375	        """Shard a full embedding/lm_head weight along vocab dim for the current TP rank.
1376	
1377	        Gemma4 uses nn.Embedding (unsharded) but the Eagle3 draft model uses
1378	        VocabParallelEmbedding (sharded). This method extracts the correct
1379	        shard so the weights can be shared.
1380	        """
1381	        tp_size = get_parallel().tp_size
1382	        if tp_size <= 1:
1383	            return weight
1384	        tp_rank = get_parallel().tp_rank
1385	        shard_size = (weight.shape[0] + tp_size - 1) // tp_size
1386	        return weight[tp_rank * shard_size : (tp_rank + 1) * shard_size]
1387	
1388	    def get_embed(self):
1389	        return self._shard_weight(self.model.embed_tokens.weight)
1390	
1391	    def get_embed_and_head(self):
1392	        if self.pp_group.world_size > 1:
1393	            # Under PP, embed_tokens lives on the first rank and lm_head on
1394	            # the last; neither rank holds both tensors, so we can't return
1395	            # the pair locally without a cross-stage gather.  Callers (RL
1396	            # weight sync, remote weight loader) currently assume a
1397	            # single-rank view — fail loudly rather than dereference a
1398	            # PPMissingLayer.
1399	            raise NotImplementedError(
1400	                "get_embed_and_head() is not implemented for Gemma4ForCausalLM "
1401	                "under pipeline parallelism. embed_tokens lives on the first "
1402	                "PP rank and lm_head on the last; use --pp-size 1 if you "
1403	                "need this API."
1404	            )
1405	        embed = self._shard_weight(self.model.embed_tokens.weight)
1406	        head = self._shard_weight(self.lm_head.weight)
1407	        return embed, head
1408	
1409	    def set_eagle3_layers_to_capture(self, layer_ids: Optional[List[int]] = None):
1410	        if layer_ids is None:
1411	            self.capture_aux_hidden_states = True
1412	            num_layers = self.config.num_hidden_layers
1413	            self.model.layers_to_capture = [2, num_layers // 2, num_layers - 3]
1414	        else:
1415	            self.capture_aux_hidden_states = True
1416	            # we plus 1 here because in sglang, for the ith layer, it takes the output
1417	            # of the (i-1)th layer as aux hidden state
1418	            self.model.layers_to_capture = [val + 1 for val in layer_ids]
1419	
1420	
1421	EntryClass = Gemma4ForCausalLM

file.content:
from __future__ import annotations

import logging
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any, Dict, Optional

import torch

from sglang.srt.environ import envs
from sglang.srt.layers import deep_gemm_wrapper
from sglang.srt.layers.moe import (
    get_deepep_mode,
    get_moe_a2a_backend,
    get_moe_runner_backend,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.moe.fused_moe_triton.layer import (
    FusedMoE,
    moe_forward_piecewise_cuda_graph_impl,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.deepep import (
    DeepEPLLCombineInput,
    DeepEPNormalCombineInput,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.moe.topk import TopKOutput, TopKOutputChecker
from sglang.srt.layers.quantization.base_config import QuantizationConfig
from sglang.srt.layers.quantization.fp8 import Fp8Config
from sglang.srt.layers.quantization.fp8_kernel import is_fp8_fnuz
from sglang.srt.layers.quantization.w4afp8 import W4AFp8Config, W4AFp8MoEMethod
from sglang.srt.model_executor.runner_backend_utils.tc_piecewise_cuda_graph import (
    is_in_tc_piecewise_cuda_graph,
)
from sglang.srt.utils import get_bool_env_var, is_hip, is_npu

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher import (
        DeepEPLLDispatchOutput,
        DeepEPNormalDispatchOutput,
        DispatchOutput,
    )

_is_hip = is_hip()
_is_npu = is_npu()
_is_fp8_fnuz = is_fp8_fnuz()
_use_aiter = get_bool_env_var("SGLANG_USE_AITER") and _is_hip


logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class DeepEPMoE(FusedMoE):
    """
    MoE Expert Parallel Impl based on DeepEP (https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepEP/tree/main)
    Mooncake EP shares the same class, as they expose the same interface.
    """

    _has_printed = False

    def __init__(
        self,
        num_experts: int,
        top_k: int,
        hidden_size: int,
        intermediate_size: int,
        layer_id: int,
        num_fused_shared_experts: int = 0,
        params_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,
        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,
        prefix: str = "",
        activation: str = "silu",
        routed_scaling_factor: Optional[float] = None,
        **kwargs,
    ):
        super().__init__(
            num_experts=num_experts,
            top_k=top_k,
            hidden_size=hidden_size,
            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,
            layer_id=layer_id,
            num_fused_shared_experts=num_fused_shared_experts,
            params_dtype=params_dtype,
            quant_config=quant_config,
            prefix=prefix,
            activation=activation,
            routed_scaling_factor=routed_scaling_factor,
            **kwargs,
        )
        if _use_aiter:
            self.deprecate_flag = True
        elif _is_npu:
            self.deprecate_flag = True
        elif deep_gemm_wrapper.ENABLE_JIT_DEEPGEMM and isinstance(
            quant_config, Fp8Config
        ):
            self.deprecate_flag = True
        elif (
            deep_gemm_wrapper.ENABLE_JIT_DEEPGEMM
            and envs.SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH.get()
        ):
            self.deprecate_flag = True
        elif (
            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutedsl()

41	    def _missing_(cls, value):
42	        if value is None:
43	            return cls.NONE
44	        for member in cls:
45	            if value == member.value:
46	                return member
47	        raise ValueError(f"No {cls.__name__} member for value {value}")

147	class DeepEPMode(Enum):
148	
149	    NORMAL = "normal"
150	    LOW_LATENCY = "low_latency"
151	    AUTO = "auto"
152	
153	    def enable_normal(self) -> bool:
154	        return self in [DeepEPMode.NORMAL, DeepEPMode.AUTO]
155	
156	    def enable_low_latency(self) -> bool:
157	        return self in [DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY, DeepEPMode.AUTO]
158	
159	    def resolve(self, is_extend_in_batch: bool) -> DeepEPMode:
160	        if self != DeepEPMode.AUTO:
161	            return self
162	
163	        if is_extend_in_batch:
164	            return DeepEPMode.NORMAL
165	        else:
166	            return DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY
167	
168	    def is_normal(self) -> bool:
169	        return self == DeepEPMode.NORMAL
170	
171	    def is_low_latency(self) -> bool:
172	        return self == DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY
173	
174	    def is_auto(self) -> bool:
175	        return self == DeepEPMode.AUTO

178	class DeepEPOutputDtype(Enum):
179	    """
180	    Describes the dispatch output data type for DeepEP.
181	
182	    - BF16: dispatch hidden states in bf16
183	    - FP8: dispatch hidden states in fp8
184	    - INT8: dispatch hidden states in int8
185	    - NVFP4: dispatch hidden states in nvfp4
186	    """
187	
188	    BF16 = "bf16"
189	    FP8 = "fp8"
190	    INT8 = "int8"
191	    NVFP4 = "nvfp4"
192	
193	
194	def get_deepep_output_dtype(self) -> DeepEPOutputDtype:
195	    """
196	    Automatically choose the dispatch output dtype for DeepEP.
197	
198	    The decision follows several checks in priority order:
199	    0. Parse server argument.
200	    1. Parse deprecated environment variables.
201	    2. If quant_config contains input_global_scale → NVFP4 path.
202	    3. Parse quant config
203	    4. If flashinfer_cutedsl or is_cutlass backend is active → BF16 (it quantizes hidden_states internally).
204	    5. Otherwise default for NPU → BF16 (the default for NPU).
205	    6. Otherwise → FP8 (the default for most models like DeepSeek-V3).
206	    """
207	
208	    # 0. Parse server argument.
209	    server_args = get_global_server_args()
210	    if server_args and server_args.deepep_dispatcher_output_dtype != "auto":
211	        return DeepEPOutputDtype(server_args.deepep_dispatcher_output_dtype)
212	
213	    # 1. Parse deprecated environment variables.
214	    if envs.SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH.get():
215	        logger.warning_once(
216	            "Warning: The env variable SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH deprecated "
217	            "and will be removed in future releases. Please use a new "
218	            "`--deepep-dispatcher-output-dtype bf16` argument instead."
219	        )
220	        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16
221	
222	    # 2. NVFP4 is detected inside dispatch_a / _dispatch_core via quant_config; no need to infer here.
223	    if self.quant_config is not None:
224	        input_global_scale = self.quant_config.get("input_global_scale", None)
225	        if input_global_scale is not None:
226	            return DeepEPOutputDtype.NVFP4
227	
228	        # 3. Parse quant config to determine the output dtype of dispatcher
229	        dispatcher_output_dtype = self.quant_config.get("dispatcher_output_dtype", None)
230	        if dispatcher_output_dtype is not None:
231	            return DeepEPOutputDtype(dispatcher_output_dtype)
232	
233	    # 4. flashinfer_cutedsl and is_cutlass expects BF16 dispatch
234	    if (
235	        get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutedsl()
236	        or get_moe_runner_backend().is_cutlass()
237	    ):
238	        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16
239	
240	    # 5. Default on NPU → BF16
241	    if _is_npu:
242	        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16
243	
244	    # 6. Default → FP8
245	    return DeepEPOutputDtype.FP8
246

411	def should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather():
412	    """
413	    Perform FP4 quantize before all-gather for flashinfer cutlass moe to reduce communication cost for high-throughput serving.
414	    """
415	    return (
416	        not DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
417	        and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_none()
418	        and get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutlass()
419	        and is_dp_attention_enabled()
420	        and MOE_QUANTIZATION == "modelopt_fp4"
421	        and get_parallel().moe_ep_size == get_parallel().attn_dp_size
422	    )

425	def should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv():
426	    """
427	    Use reduce_scatterv in the standard dispatcher's combine() for DP attention
428	    with EP, replacing the default all-reduce + dp_scatter path.
429	    Only changes the combine (post-kernel) communication; dispatch is unchanged.
430	    """
431	    return (
432	        not should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather()
433	        and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_none()
434	        and is_dp_attention_enabled()
435	        and get_parallel().attn_dp_size > 1
436	        and get_parallel().moe_ep_size == get_parallel().attn_dp_size
437	    )

439	
440	def should_skip_post_experts_all_reduce(
441	    *,
442	    is_tp_path: bool,
443	    use_reduce_scatter: bool = False,
444	    should_allreduce_fusion: bool = False,
445	) -> bool:
446	    """Whether to skip the post-experts all-reduce (EP or TP) because a
447	    downstream component will fuse, replace, or absorb it.
448	
449	    Skip reasons, in order:
450	      - ``should_allreduce_fusion``: LayerCommunicator will fuse the all-reduce
451	        with the next layer's residual all-reduce.
452	      - ``use_reduce_scatter``: LayerCommunicator's post-attention scatter will
453	        do reduce-scatter, which would double-reduce on top of an all-reduce.
454	      - ``should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv()``: the standard dispatcher's combine
455	        path replaces the all-reduce with a reduce-scatterv.
456	      - ``should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather()`` (TP path only):
457	        the flashinfer cutlass FP4 kernel performs an all-gather that absorbs
458	        the post-experts TP all-reduce. Not relevant to the EP all-reduce.
459	      - ``get_moe_a2a_backend().is_flashinfer()``: the flashinfer A2A
460	        dispatcher's ``MoeAlltoAll.combine`` already alltoall-reduces partial
461	        MoE outputs back to the source rank, so any further EP/TP all-reduce
462	        would double-count and overflow BF16. Mirrors TRTLLM's
463	        ``not enable_alltoall`` gate
464	        (``tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/interface.py:879``).
465	
466	    The first two args are layer-context flags from ``LayerCommunicator`` and
467	    default to ``False`` for models that don't use it. Pass ``is_tp_path=True``
468	    for the post-experts TP all-reduce, ``False`` for the EP all-reduce.
469	    """
470	    if should_allreduce_fusion or use_reduce_scatter:
471	        return True
472	    if should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv():
473	        return True
474	    if is_tp_path and should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather():
475	        return True
476	    if get_moe_a2a_backend().is_flashinfer():
477	        return True
478	    return False
479

481	@contextmanager
482	def speculative_moe_backend_context():
483	    """
484	    Context manager to temporarily use the speculative MoE backend for draft model operations.
485	    This ensures that draft models in speculative decoding use the configured speculative backend.
486	    """
487	    global MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
488	    original_backend = MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
489	    try:
490	        MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = get_speculative_moe_runner_backend()
491	        yield
492	    finally:
493	        MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = original_backend
494	
495	
496	@contextmanager
497	def speculative_moe_a2a_backend_context():
498	    """
499	    Context manager to temporarily use the speculative MoE A2A backend for draft model operations.
500	    This ensures that draft models in speculative decoding use the configured speculative A2A backend.
501	    """
502	    global MOE_A2A_BACKEND
503	    global DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
504	    original_backend = MOE_A2A_BACKEND
505	    original_disable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather = (
506	        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
507	    )
508	    try:
509	        MOE_A2A_BACKEND = get_speculative_moe_a2a_backend()
510	        # Disable FP4 allgather for spec decode since MTP layers are unquantized
511	        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER = True
512	        yield
513	    finally:
514	        MOE_A2A_BACKEND = original_backend
515	        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER = (
516	            original_disable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather
517	        )

520	# The type of method in top-K routing, for use in torch custom op
521	# Please keep this in sync with the counterpart defined in https://github.com/flashinfer-ai/flashinfer/blob/main/include/flashinfer/trtllm/fused_moe/runner.h
522	class RoutingMethodType(IntEnum):
523	    # Default: Softmax -> TopK
524	    Default = (0,)
525	    # Renormalize: TopK -> Softmax
526	    Renormalize = (1,)
527	    # DeepSeekV3: Sigmoid -> RoutingBiasAdd -> Top2 in group -> Top4 groups -> Top8 experts from the Top4 groups
528	    DeepSeekV3 = (2,)
529	    # Llama4: Top1 -> Sigmoid
530	    Llama4 = (3,)
531	    # Qwen3: Softmax -> TopK -> Renormalize
532	    RenormalizeNaive = (4,)
533	    # TopK only (no softmax)
534	    TopK = (5,)
535	    # SigmoidRenorm: Sigmoid -> TopK -> Renormalize
536	    SigmoidRenorm = (6,)
537	    # MiniMax2
538	    MiniMax2 = (7,)
539	    # Sigmoid: Sigmoid -> TopK (no renormalize)
540	    Sigmoid = (8,)
541	    # Unspecified
542	    Unspecified = 9

561	def get_moe_weight_sizes(inter_dim, is_concat, is_packed, is_aiter_moe):
562	    """
563	    Calculate dimensions for MoE weight tensors.
564	
565	    Args:
566	        inter_dim: Base intermediate dimension.
567	        is_concat: If True, fusions W1 (gate) and W3 (up) projections.
568	        is_packed: If True, uses 4-bit quantization (two FP4 elements per byte).
569	        is_aiter_moe: If True, applies Aiter-specific kernel padding alignment.
570	    """
571	    # w2_down_dim is the packing rank, but w13_up_dim not (of matrix to matmul)
572	    w13_up_dim = 2 * inter_dim if is_concat else inter_dim

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
import os
from contextlib import contextmanager
from enum import Enum, IntEnum
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Optional

import torch

from sglang.srt.environ import envs
from sglang.srt.layers.dp_attention import (
    is_dp_attention_enabled,
)
from sglang.srt.runtime_context import get_parallel
from sglang.srt.utils import is_cuda, is_npu

_is_npu = is_npu()

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from sglang.srt.server_args import ServerArgs

from sglang.srt.server_args import get_global_server_args

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class MoeA2ABackend(Enum):

    NONE = "none"
    DEEPEP = "deepep"
    MOONCAKE = "mooncake"
    NIXL = "nixl"
    MORI = "mori"
    ASCEND_FUSEEP = "ascend_fuseep"
    FLASHINFER = "flashinfer"
    MEGAMOE = "megamoe"
    CUSTOMIZED = "customized"

    @classmethod
    def _missing_(cls, value):
        if value is None:
            return cls.NONE
        for member in cls:
            if value == member.value:
                return member
        raise ValueError(f"No {cls.__name__} member for value {value}")

    def is_none(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.NONE

    def is_deepep(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.DEEPEP

    def is_mooncake(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.MOONCAKE

    def is_nixl(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.NIXL

    def is_flashinfer(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.FLASHINFER

    def is_ascend_fuseep(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.ASCEND_FUSEEP

    def is_mori(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.MORI

    def is_megamoe(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.MEGAMOE

    def is_customized(self):
        return self == MoeA2ABackend.CUSTOMIZED

    def supports_aiter(self) -> bool:
        return self in (
            MoeA2ABackend.NONE,
            MoeA2ABackend.DEEPEP,
            MoeA2ABackend.MOONCAKE,
            MoeA2ABackend.NIXL,
            MoeA2ABackend.MORI,
        )


class MoeRunnerBackend(Enum):

    AUTO = "auto"
    DEEP_GEMM = "deep_gemm"
    TRITON = "triton"
    TRITON_KERNELS = "triton_kernel"
    FLASHINFER_TRTLLM = "flashinfer_trtllm"
    EXPERIMENTAL_SGL_TRTLLM = "experimental_sgl_trtllm"
    FLASHINFER_TRTLLM_ROUTED = "flashinfer_trtllm_routed"
    FLASHINFER_CUTLASS = "flashinfer_cutlass"
    FLASHINFER_MXFP4 = "flashinfer_mxfp4"
    FLASHINFER_CUTEDSL = "flashinfer_cutedsl"
    CUTLASS = "cutlass"
    MARLIN = "marlin"
    AITER = "aiter"

    def is_auto(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.AUTO

    def is_deep_gemm(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.DEEP_GEMM

    def is_triton(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON

    def is_triton_kernels(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON_KERNELS

    def is_flashinfer_trtllm(self):
        # experimental_sgl_trtllm shares the TRT-LLM FP8 kernels + layout, so it inherits
        # trtllm weight-prep here; divergent sites check is_experimental_sgl_trtllm() first.
        return self in (
            MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_TRTLLM,
            MoeRunnerBackend.EXPERIMENTAL_SGL_TRTLLM,
        )

    def is_experimental_sgl_trtllm(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.EXPERIMENTAL_SGL_TRTLLM

    def is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_TRTLLM_ROUTED

    def is_flashinfer_cutlass(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_CUTLASS

    def is_flashinfer_cutedsl(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_CUTEDSL

    def is_flashinfer_mxfp4(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_MXFP4

    def is_cutlass(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.CUTLASS

    def is_marlin(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.MARLIN

    def is_aiter(self):
        return self == MoeRunnerBackend.AITER


class DeepEPMode(Enum):

    NORMAL = "normal"
    LOW_LATENCY = "low_latency"
    AUTO = "auto"

    def enable_normal(self) -> bool:
        return self in [DeepEPMode.NORMAL, DeepEPMode.AUTO]

    def enable_low_latency(self) -> bool:
        return self in [DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY, DeepEPMode.AUTO]

    def resolve(self, is_extend_in_batch: bool) -> DeepEPMode:
        if self != DeepEPMode.AUTO:
            return self

        if is_extend_in_batch:
            return DeepEPMode.NORMAL
        else:
            return DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY

    def is_normal(self) -> bool:
        return self == DeepEPMode.NORMAL

    def is_low_latency(self) -> bool:
        return self == DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY

    def is_auto(self) -> bool:
        return self == DeepEPMode.AUTO


class DeepEPOutputDtype(Enum):
    """
    Describes the dispatch output data type for DeepEP.

    - BF16: dispatch hidden states in bf16
    - FP8: dispatch hidden states in fp8
    - INT8: dispatch hidden states in int8
    - NVFP4: dispatch hidden states in nvfp4
    """

    BF16 = "bf16"
    FP8 = "fp8"
    INT8 = "int8"
    NVFP4 = "nvfp4"


def get_deepep_output_dtype(self) -> DeepEPOutputDtype:
    """
    Automatically choose the dispatch output dtype for DeepEP.

    The decision follows several checks in priority order:
    0. Parse server argument.
    1. Parse deprecated environment variables.
    2. If quant_config contains input_global_scale → NVFP4 path.
    3. Parse quant config
    4. If flashinfer_cutedsl or is_cutlass backend is active → BF16 (it quantizes hidden_states internally).
    5. Otherwise default for NPU → BF16 (the default for NPU).
    6. Otherwise → FP8 (the default for most models like DeepSeek-V3).
    """

    # 0. Parse server argument.
    server_args = get_global_server_args()
    if server_args and server_args.deepep_dispatcher_output_dtype != "auto":
        return DeepEPOutputDtype(server_args.deepep_dispatcher_output_dtype)

    # 1. Parse deprecated environment variables.
    if envs.SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH.get():
        logger.warning_once(
            "Warning: The env variable SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH deprecated "
            "and will be removed in future releases. Please use a new "
            "`--deepep-dispatcher-output-dtype bf16` argument instead."
        )
        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16

    # 2. NVFP4 is detected inside dispatch_a / _dispatch_core via quant_config; no need to infer here.
    if self.quant_config is not None:
        input_global_scale = self.quant_config.get("input_global_scale", None)
        if input_global_scale is not None:
            return DeepEPOutputDtype.NVFP4

        # 3. Parse quant config to determine the output dtype of dispatcher
        dispatcher_output_dtype = self.quant_config.get("dispatcher_output_dtype", None)
        if dispatcher_output_dtype is not None:
            return DeepEPOutputDtype(dispatcher_output_dtype)

    # 4. flashinfer_cutedsl and is_cutlass expects BF16 dispatch
    if (
        get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutedsl()
        or get_moe_runner_backend().is_cutlass()
    ):
        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16

    # 5. Default on NPU → BF16
    if _is_npu:
        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16

    # 6. Default → FP8
    return DeepEPOutputDtype.FP8


MOE_A2A_BACKEND: Optional[MoeA2ABackend] = None
MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND: Optional[MoeRunnerBackend] = None
SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND: Optional[MoeRunnerBackend] = None
SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND: Optional[MoeA2ABackend] = None
DEEPEP_MODE: Optional[DeepEPMode] = None
IS_TBO_ENABLED: Optional[bool] = None
IS_SBO_ENABLED: Optional[bool] = None
TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD: Optional[float] = None
DEEPEP_CONFIG: Optional[str] = None
DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER: Optional[bool] = None
MOE_QUANTIZATION: Optional[str] = None


def initialize_moe_config(server_args: ServerArgs):
    global MOE_A2A_BACKEND
    global MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
    global SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
    global SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND
    global DEEPEP_MODE
    global DEEPEP_CONFIG
    global IS_TBO_ENABLED
    global IS_SBO_ENABLED
    global TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD
    global DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
    global MOE_QUANTIZATION

    MOE_A2A_BACKEND = MoeA2ABackend(server_args.moe_a2a_backend)
    MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = MoeRunnerBackend(server_args.moe_runner_backend)
    SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = (
        MoeRunnerBackend(server_args.speculative_moe_runner_backend)
        if server_args.speculative_moe_runner_backend is not None
        else MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
    )
    SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND = (
        MoeA2ABackend(server_args.speculative_moe_a2a_backend)
        if server_args.speculative_moe_a2a_backend is not None
        else MOE_A2A_BACKEND
    )
    DEEPEP_MODE = DeepEPMode(server_args.deepep_mode)
    DEEPEP_CONFIG = server_args.deepep_config or ""
    IS_TBO_ENABLED = server_args.enable_two_batch_overlap
    IS_SBO_ENABLED = server_args.enable_single_batch_overlap
    if IS_SBO_ENABLED and is_cuda():
        if torch.cuda.get_device_capability()[0] == 9:
            raise ValueError(
                "SBO (single batch overlap) is not supported on SM90 GPUs with latest sgl-deep-gemm wheel. Please try removing --enable-single-batch-overlap argument."
            )
    TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD = server_args.tbo_token_distribution_threshold
    DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER = (
        server_args.disable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather
    )
    MOE_QUANTIZATION = server_args.quantization


def get_moe_a2a_backend() -> MoeA2ABackend:
    global MOE_A2A_BACKEND
    if MOE_A2A_BACKEND is None:
        MOE_A2A_BACKEND = MoeA2ABackend.NONE
    return MOE_A2A_BACKEND


def get_moe_runner_backend() -> MoeRunnerBackend:
    global MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
    if MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND is None:
        MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = MoeRunnerBackend.AUTO
    return MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND


def get_speculative_moe_runner_backend() -> MoeRunnerBackend:
    global SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
    if SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND is None:
        logger.warning(
            "SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND is not initialized, using auto backend"
        )
        SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = MoeRunnerBackend.AUTO
    return SPECULATIVE_MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND


def get_speculative_moe_a2a_backend() -> MoeA2ABackend:
    global SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND
    if SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND is None:
        logger.warning(
            "SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND is not initialized, using none backend"
        )
        SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND = MoeA2ABackend.NONE
    return SPECULATIVE_MOE_A2A_BACKEND


def get_deepep_mode() -> DeepEPMode:
    global DEEPEP_MODE
    if DEEPEP_MODE is None:
        logger.warning("DEEPEP_MODE is not initialized, using auto mode")
        DEEPEP_MODE = DeepEPMode.AUTO
    return DEEPEP_MODE


def get_deepep_config() -> str:
    global DEEPEP_CONFIG
    if DEEPEP_CONFIG is None:
        logger.warning("DEEPEP_CONFIG is not initialized, using default config")
        DEEPEP_CONFIG = ""
    return DEEPEP_CONFIG


def is_tbo_enabled() -> bool:
    global IS_TBO_ENABLED
    if IS_TBO_ENABLED is None:
        IS_TBO_ENABLED = False
    return IS_TBO_ENABLED


def is_sbo_enabled() -> bool:
    global IS_SBO_ENABLED
    if IS_SBO_ENABLED is None:
        IS_SBO_ENABLED = False
    return IS_SBO_ENABLED


def is_deepep_class_backend() -> bool:
    """Check if the MoE backend is DeepEP-family (DeepEP, Mooncake, or Mori)."""
    b = get_moe_a2a_backend()
    return b.is_deepep() or b.is_mooncake() or b.is_mori()


def uses_per_rank_fused_shared_slots() -> bool:
    """Check whether fused shared experts use per-rank physical slots."""
    return is_deepep_class_backend() or get_moe_a2a_backend().is_megamoe()


def has_per_rank_fused_shared_slots(num_fused_shared_experts: int) -> bool:
    """Check whether this layer has fused shared experts in per-rank slots."""
    return num_fused_shared_experts > 0 and uses_per_rank_fused_shared_slots()


def is_flashinfer_cutedsl_v1_path() -> bool:
    """CuteDSL v1 + DeepEP low-latency path (no MoeRunner, no autotune)."""
    return (
        get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutedsl()
        and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_deepep()
    )


def get_tbo_token_distribution_threshold() -> float:
    global TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD
    if TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD is None:
        logger.warning(
            "TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD is not initialized, using 0.48"
        )
        TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD = 0.48
    return TBO_TOKEN_DISTRIBUTION_THRESHOLD


def filter_moe_weight_param_global_expert(name, x, num_local_experts):
    """
    Filter out for MoE expert parameters that requires global expert.
    """
    return (
        not getattr(x, "_sglang_require_global_experts", False)
        and x.data.ndim > 0
        and x.data.shape[0] == num_local_experts
    )


def should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather():
    """
    Perform FP4 quantize before all-gather for flashinfer cutlass moe to reduce communication cost for high-throughput serving.
    """
    return (
        not DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
        and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_none()
        and get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutlass()
        and is_dp_attention_enabled()
        and MOE_QUANTIZATION == "modelopt_fp4"
        and get_parallel().moe_ep_size == get_parallel().attn_dp_size
    )


def should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv():
    """
    Use reduce_scatterv in the standard dispatcher's combine() for DP attention
    with EP, replacing the default all-reduce + dp_scatter path.
    Only changes the combine (post-kernel) communication; dispatch is unchanged.
    """
    return (
        not should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather()
        and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_none()
        and is_dp_attention_enabled()
        and get_parallel().attn_dp_size > 1
        and get_parallel().moe_ep_size == get_parallel().attn_dp_size
    )


def should_skip_post_experts_all_reduce(
    *,
    is_tp_path: bool,
    use_reduce_scatter: bool = False,
    should_allreduce_fusion: bool = False,
) -> bool:
    """Whether to skip the post-experts all-reduce (EP or TP) because a
    downstream component will fuse, replace, or absorb it.

    Skip reasons, in order:
      - ``should_allreduce_fusion``: LayerCommunicator will fuse the all-reduce
        with the next layer's residual all-reduce.
      - ``use_reduce_scatter``: LayerCommunicator's post-attention scatter will
        do reduce-scatter, which would double-reduce on top of an all-reduce.
      - ``should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv()``: the standard dispatcher's combine
        path replaces the all-reduce with a reduce-scatterv.
      - ``should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather()`` (TP path only):
        the flashinfer cutlass FP4 kernel performs an all-gather that absorbs
        the post-experts TP all-reduce. Not relevant to the EP all-reduce.
      - ``get_moe_a2a_backend().is_flashinfer()``: the flashinfer A2A
        dispatcher's ``MoeAlltoAll.combine`` already alltoall-reduces partial
        MoE outputs back to the source rank, so any further EP/TP all-reduce
        would double-count and overflow BF16. Mirrors TRTLLM's
        ``not enable_alltoall`` gate
        (``tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/interface.py:879``).

    The first two args are layer-context flags from ``LayerCommunicator`` and
    default to ``False`` for models that don't use it. Pass ``is_tp_path=True``
    for the post-experts TP all-reduce, ``False`` for the EP all-reduce.
    """
    if should_allreduce_fusion or use_reduce_scatter:
        return True
    if should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv():
        return True
    if is_tp_path and should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather():
        return True
    if get_moe_a2a_backend().is_flashinfer():
        return True
    return False


@contextmanager
def speculative_moe_backend_context():
    """
    Context manager to temporarily use the speculative MoE backend for draft model operations.
    This ensures that draft models in speculative decoding use the configured speculative backend.
    """
    global MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
    original_backend = MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
    try:
        MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = get_speculative_moe_runner_backend()
        yield
    finally:
        MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = original_backend


@contextmanager
def speculative_moe_a2a_backend_context():
    """
    Context manager to temporarily use the speculative MoE A2A backend for draft model operations.
    This ensures that draft models in speculative decoding use the configured speculative A2A backend.
    """
    global MOE_A2A_BACKEND
    global DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
    original_backend = MOE_A2A_BACKEND
    original_disable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather = (
        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
    )
    try:
        MOE_A2A_BACKEND = get_speculative_moe_a2a_backend()
        # Disable FP4 allgather for spec decode since MTP layers are unquantized
        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER = True
        yield
    finally:
        MOE_A2A_BACKEND = original_backend
        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER = (
            original_disable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather
        )


# The type of method in top-K routing, for use in torch custom op
# Please keep this in sync with the counterpart defined in https://github.com/flashinfer-ai/flashinfer/blob/main/include/flashinfer/trtllm/fused_moe/runner.h
class RoutingMethodType(IntEnum):
    # Default: Softmax -> TopK
    Default = (0,)
    # Renormalize: TopK -> Softmax
    Renormalize = (1,)
    # DeepSeekV3: Sigmoid -> RoutingBiasAdd -> Top2 in group -> Top4 groups -> Top8 experts from the Top4 groups
    DeepSeekV3 = (2,)
    # Llama4: Top1 -> Sigmoid
    Llama4 = (3,)
    # Qwen3: Softmax -> TopK -> Renormalize
    RenormalizeNaive = (4,)
    # TopK only (no softmax)
    TopK = (5,)
    # SigmoidRenorm: Sigmoid -> TopK -> Renormalize
    SigmoidRenorm = (6,)
    # MiniMax2
    MiniMax2 = (7,)
    # Sigmoid: Sigmoid -> TopK (no renormalize)
    Sigmoid = (8,)
    # Unspecified
    Unspecified = 9


AITER_PADDING_SIZE = 128
TRITON_PADDING_SIZE = 128


# Unit of padding - context dependent
def get_moe_padding_size(is_aiter_moe):
    if is_aiter_moe:
        return AITER_PADDING_SIZE
    else:
        return (
            TRITON_PADDING_SIZE
            if bool(int(os.getenv("SGLANG_MOE_PADDING", "0")))
            else 0
        )


def get_moe_weight_sizes(inter_dim, is_concat, is_packed, is_aiter_moe):
    """
    Calculate dimensions for MoE weight tensors.

    Args:
        inter_dim: Base intermediate dimension.
        is_concat: If True, fusions W1 (gate) and W3 (up) projections.
        is_packed: If True, uses 4-bit quantization (two FP4 elements per byte).
        is_aiter_moe: If True, applies Aiter-specific kernel padding alignment.
    """
    # w2_down_dim is the packing rank, but w13_up_dim not (of matrix to matmul)
    w13_up_dim = 2 * inter_dim if is_concat else inter_dim
    w2_down_dim = inter_dim // 2 if is_packed else inter_dim

    if is_aiter_moe:
        padding_size = get_moe_padding_size(True)
        align_aiter = lambda n: ((n + padding_size - 1) // padding_size) * padding_size
        is_padded = (w2_down_dim % padding_size) > 0
        if is_padded:
            # w2_down_dim, padding & aligned, unit: parameter dtype
            w2_down_dim = align_aiter(w2_down_dim)
        # up proj + gate fusion : 2x
        if is_concat:
            w13_up_dim = w2_down_dim * 2
        # packed
        if hasattr(torch, "float4_e2m1fn_x2") and is_packed:
            # w13_up_dim (row rank of matmul matrix) is not packing dim, *2 to recover
            w13_up_dim *= 2

    return (w13_up_dim, w2_down_dim, False if not is_aiter_moe else is_padded)

147	class DeepEPMode(Enum):
148	
149	    NORMAL = "normal"
150	    LOW_LATENCY = "low_latency"
151	    AUTO = "auto"
152	
153	    def enable_normal(self) -> bool:
154	        return self in [DeepEPMode.NORMAL, DeepEPMode.AUTO]
155	
156	    def enable_low_latency(self) -> bool:
157	        return self in [DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY, DeepEPMode.AUTO]
158	
159	    def resolve(self, is_extend_in_batch: bool) -> DeepEPMode:
160	        if self != DeepEPMode.AUTO:
161	            return self
162	
163	        if is_extend_in_batch:
164	            return DeepEPMode.NORMAL
165	        else:
166	            return DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY
167	
168	    def is_normal(self) -> bool:
169	        return self == DeepEPMode.NORMAL
170	
171	    def is_low_latency(self) -> bool:
172	        return self == DeepEPMode.LOW_LATENCY
173	
174	    def is_auto(self) -> bool:

178	class DeepEPOutputDtype(Enum):
179	    """
180	    Describes the dispatch output data type for DeepEP.
181	
182	    - BF16: dispatch hidden states in bf16
183	    - FP8: dispatch hidden states in fp8
184	    - INT8: dispatch hidden states in int8
185	    - NVFP4: dispatch hidden states in nvfp4
186	    """
187	
188	    BF16 = "bf16"
189	    FP8 = "fp8"
190	    INT8 = "int8"
191	    NVFP4 = "nvfp4"
192	
193	
194	def get_deepep_output_dtype(self) -> DeepEPOutputDtype:
195	    """
196	    Automatically choose the dispatch output dtype for DeepEP.
197	
198	    The decision follows several checks in priority order:
199	    0. Parse server argument.
200	    1. Parse deprecated environment variables.
201	    2. If quant_config contains input_global_scale → NVFP4 path.
202	    3. Parse quant config
203	    4. If flashinfer_cutedsl or is_cutlass backend is active → BF16 (it quantizes hidden_states internally).
204	    5. Otherwise default for NPU → BF16 (the default for NPU).
205	    6. Otherwise → FP8 (the default for most models like DeepSeek-V3).
206	    """
207	
208	    # 0. Parse server argument.
209	    server_args = get_global_server_args()
210	    if server_args and server_args.deepep_dispatcher_output_dtype != "auto":
211	        return DeepEPOutputDtype(server_args.deepep_dispatcher_output_dtype)
212	
213	    # 1. Parse deprecated environment variables.
214	    if envs.SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH.get():
215	        logger.warning_once(
216	            "Warning: The env variable SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH deprecated "
217	            "and will be removed in future releases. Please use a new "
218	            "`--deepep-dispatcher-output-dtype bf16` argument instead."
219	        )
220	        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16
221	
222	    # 2. NVFP4 is detected inside dispatch_a / _dispatch_core via quant_config; no need to infer here.
223	    if self.quant_config is not None:
224	        input_global_scale = self.quant_config.get("input_global_scale", None)
225	        if input_global_scale is not None:
226	            return DeepEPOutputDtype.NVFP4
227	
228	        # 3. Parse quant config to determine the output dtype of dispatcher
229	        dispatcher_output_dtype = self.quant_config.get("dispatcher_output_dtype", None)
230	        if dispatcher_output_dtype is not None:
231	            return DeepEPOutputDtype(dispatcher_output_dtype)
232	
233	    # 4. flashinfer_cutedsl and is_cutlass expects BF16 dispatch
234	    if (
235	        get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutedsl()
236	        or get_moe_runner_backend().is_cutlass()
237	    ):
238	        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16
239	
240	    # 5. Default on NPU → BF16
241	    if _is_npu:
242	        return DeepEPOutputDtype.BF16
243	
244	    # 6. Default → FP8
245	    return DeepEPOutputDtype.FP8
246	
247

411	def should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather():
412	    """
413	    Perform FP4 quantize before all-gather for flashinfer cutlass moe to reduce communication cost for high-throughput serving.
414	    """
415	    return (
416	        not DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
417	        and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_none()
418	        and get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutlass()
419	        and is_dp_attention_enabled()
420	        and MOE_QUANTIZATION == "modelopt_fp4"
421	        and get_parallel().moe_ep_size == get_parallel().attn_dp_size
422	    )

425	def should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv():
426	    """
427	    Use reduce_scatterv in the standard dispatcher's combine() for DP attention
428	    with EP, replacing the default all-reduce + dp_scatter path.
429	    Only changes the combine (post-kernel) communication; dispatch is unchanged.
430	    """
431	    return (
432	        not should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather()
433	        and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_none()
434	        and is_dp_attention_enabled()
435	        and get_parallel().attn_dp_size > 1
436	        and get_parallel().moe_ep_size == get_parallel().attn_dp_size
437	    )

439	
440	def should_skip_post_experts_all_reduce(
441	    *,
442	    is_tp_path: bool,
443	    use_reduce_scatter: bool = False,
444	    should_allreduce_fusion: bool = False,
445	) -> bool:
446	    """Whether to skip the post-experts all-reduce (EP or TP) because a
447	    downstream component will fuse, replace, or absorb it.
448	
449	    Skip reasons, in order:
450	      - ``should_allreduce_fusion``: LayerCommunicator will fuse the all-reduce
451	        with the next layer's residual all-reduce.
452	      - ``use_reduce_scatter``: LayerCommunicator's post-attention scatter will
453	        do reduce-scatter, which would double-reduce on top of an all-reduce.
454	      - ``should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv()``: the standard dispatcher's combine
455	        path replaces the all-reduce with a reduce-scatterv.
456	      - ``should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather()`` (TP path only):
457	        the flashinfer cutlass FP4 kernel performs an all-gather that absorbs
458	        the post-experts TP all-reduce. Not relevant to the EP all-reduce.
459	      - ``get_moe_a2a_backend().is_flashinfer()``: the flashinfer A2A
460	        dispatcher's ``MoeAlltoAll.combine`` already alltoall-reduces partial
461	        MoE outputs back to the source rank, so any further EP/TP all-reduce
462	        would double-count and overflow BF16. Mirrors TRTLLM's
463	        ``not enable_alltoall`` gate
464	        (``tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/interface.py:879``).
465	
466	    The first two args are layer-context flags from ``LayerCommunicator`` and
467	    default to ``False`` for models that don't use it. Pass ``is_tp_path=True``
468	    for the post-experts TP all-reduce, ``False`` for the EP all-reduce.
469	    """
470	    if should_allreduce_fusion or use_reduce_scatter:
471	        return True
472	    if should_use_dp_reduce_scatterv():
473	        return True
474	    if is_tp_path and should_use_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather():
475	        return True
476	    if get_moe_a2a_backend().is_flashinfer():
477	        return True
478	    return False

482	def speculative_moe_backend_context():
483	    """
484	    Context manager to temporarily use the speculative MoE backend for draft model operations.
485	    This ensures that draft models in speculative decoding use the configured speculative backend.
486	    """
487	    global MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
488	    original_backend = MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND
489	    try:
490	        MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = get_speculative_moe_runner_backend()
491	        yield
492	    finally:
493	        MOE_RUNNER_BACKEND = original_backend

496	@contextmanager

498	    """
499	    Context manager to temporarily use the speculative MoE A2A backend for draft model operations.
500	    This ensures that draft models in speculative decoding use the configured speculative A2A backend.
501	    """
502	    global MOE_A2A_BACKEND
503	    global DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
504	    original_backend = MOE_A2A_BACKEND
505	    original_disable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather = (
506	        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER
507	    )
508	    try:
509	        MOE_A2A_BACKEND = get_speculative_moe_a2a_backend()
510	        # Disable FP4 allgather for spec decode since MTP layers are unquantized
511	        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER = True
512	        yield
513	    finally:
514	        MOE_A2A_BACKEND = original_backend
515	        DISABLE_FLASHINFER_CUTLASS_MOE_FP4_ALLGATHER = (
516	            original_disable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe_fp4_allgather
517	        )
