520	# The type of method in top-K routing, for use in torch custom op
521	# Please keep this in sync with the counterpart defined in https://github.com/flashinfer-ai/flashinfer/blob/main/include/flashinfer/trtllm/fused_moe/runner.h
522	class RoutingMethodType(IntEnum):
523	    # Default: Softmax -> TopK
524	    Default = (0,)
525	    # Renormalize: TopK -> Softmax
526	    Renormalize = (1,)
527	    # DeepSeekV3: Sigmoid -> RoutingBiasAdd -> Top2 in group -> Top4 groups -> Top8 experts from the Top4 groups
528	    DeepSeekV3 = (2,)
529	    # Llama4: Top1 -> Sigmoid
530	    Llama4 = (3,)
531	    # Qwen3: Softmax -> TopK -> Renormalize
532	    RenormalizeNaive = (4,)
533	    # TopK only (no softmax)
534	    TopK = (5,)
535	    # SigmoidRenorm: Sigmoid -> TopK -> Renormalize
536	    SigmoidRenorm = (6,)
537	    # MiniMax2
538	    MiniMax2 = (7,)
539	    # Sigmoid: Sigmoid -> TopK (no renormalize)
540	    Sigmoid = (8,)
541	    # Unspecified
542	    Unspecified = 9
543	
544	
545	AITER_PADDING_SIZE = 128
546	TRITON_PADDING_SIZE = 128
547	
548	
549	# Unit of padding - context dependent
550	def get_moe_padding_size(is_aiter_moe):
551	    if is_aiter_moe:
552	        return AITER_PADDING_SIZE
553	    else:
554	        return (
555	            TRITON_PADDING_SIZE
556	            if bool(int(os.getenv("SGLANG_MOE_PADDING", "0")))
557	            else 0
558	        )
559	
560	
561	def get_moe_weight_sizes(inter_dim, is_concat, is_packed, is_aiter_moe):
562	    """
563	    Calculate dimensions for MoE weight tensors.
564	
565	    Args:
566	        inter_dim: Base intermediate dimension.
567	        is_concat: If True, fusions W1 (gate) and W3 (up) projections.
568	        is_packed: If True, uses 4-bit quantization (two FP4 elements per byte).
569	        is_aiter_moe: If True, applies Aiter-specific kernel padding alignment.
570	    """
571	    # w2_down_dim is the packing rank, but w13_up_dim not (of matrix to matmul)
572	    w13_up_dim = 2 * inter_dim if is_concat else inter_dim
573	    w2_down_dim = inter_dim // 2 if is_packed else inter_dim
574	
575	    if is_aiter_moe:
576	        padding_size = get_moe_padding_size(True)
577	        align_aiter = lambda n: ((n + padding_size - 1) // padding_size) * padding_size
578	        is_padded = (w2_down_dim % padding_size) > 0
579	        if is_padded:
580	            # w2_down_dim, padding & aligned, unit: parameter dtype
581	            w2_down_dim = align_aiter(w2_down_dim)
582	        # up proj + gate fusion : 2x
583	        if is_concat:
584	            w13_up_dim = w2_down_dim * 2
585	        # packed
586	        if hasattr(torch, "float4_e2m1fn_x2") and is_packed:
587	            # w13_up_dim (row rank of matmul matrix) is not packing dim, *2 to recover
588	            w13_up_dim *= 2
589	
590	    return (w13_up_dim, w2_down_dim, False if not is_aiter_moe else is_padded)
591

139	class FusedMoE(torch.nn.Module):
140	    """FusedMoE layer for MoE models.
141	
142	    This layer contains both MergedColumnParallel weights (gate_up_proj /
143	    w13) and RowParallelLinear weights (down_proj/ w2).
144	
145	    Note: Mixtral uses w1, w2, and w3 for gate, up, and down_proj. We
146	    copy that naming convention here and handle any remapping in the
147	    load_weights function in each model implementation.
148	
149	    Args:
150	        num_experts: Number of experts in the model
151	        top_k: Number of experts selected for each token
152	        hidden_size: Input hidden state size of the transformer
153	        intermediate_size: Intermediate size of the experts
154	        params_dtype: Data type for the parameters.
155	        reduce_results: Whether to apply all_reduce on the output of the layer
156	        quant_config: Quantization configuration.
157	        inplace: suggestion to compute inplace (modify input activation).
158	    """
159	
160	    def __init__(
161	        self,
162	        num_experts: int,
163	        hidden_size: int,
164	        intermediate_size: int,
165	        layer_id: int,
166	        top_k: Optional[int] = None,
167	        num_fused_shared_experts: int = 0,
168	        params_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,
169	        reduce_results: bool = False,
170	        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,
171	        prefix: str = "",
172	        activation: str = "silu",
173	        apply_router_weight_on_input: bool = False,
174	        use_presharded_weights: bool = False,
175	        inplace: bool = True,
176	        no_combine: bool = False,
177	        routed_scaling_factor: Optional[float] = None,
178	        gemm1_alpha: Optional[float] = None,
179	        gemm1_clamp_limit: Optional[float] = None,
180	        swiglu_limit: Optional[float] = None,
181	        use_weight_loader_fused: bool = False,
182	        with_bias=False,
183	        routing_method_type: Optional[RoutingMethodType] = None,
184	        is_gated: bool = True,
185	        gate_up_interleaved: bool = True,
186	    ):
187	        super().__init__()
188	        if params_dtype is None:
189	            params_dtype = torch.get_default_dtype()
190	
191	        self.layer_id = layer_id
192	        self.top_k = top_k
193	        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
194	        self.num_experts = num_experts
195	        self.num_fused_shared_experts = num_fused_shared_experts
196	
197	        self.enable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe = (
198	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutlass()
199	        )
200	        self.moe_ep_size = get_parallel().moe_ep_size
201	        self.moe_ep_rank = get_parallel().moe_ep_rank
202	        self.moe_tp_size = get_parallel().moe_tp_size
203	        self.moe_tp_rank = get_parallel().moe_tp_rank
204	
205	        # For fused shared experts, DeepEP-class and MegaMOE backends use
206	        # per-rank physical shared slots, while other backends keep fused
207	        # shared experts as global shared slots. When fusion is disabled,
208	        # num_fused_shared_experts is 0 and no shared slots are added here.
209	        if has_per_rank_fused_shared_slots(num_fused_shared_experts):
210	            num_shared_slots = num_fused_shared_experts * self.moe_ep_size
211	        else:
212	            num_shared_slots = num_fused_shared_experts
213	
214	        assert (num_experts - num_shared_slots) % self.moe_ep_size == 0
215	        self._num_global_routed = num_experts - num_shared_slots
216	        self._num_local_routed = self._num_global_routed // self.moe_ep_size
217	        self.num_local_experts = self._num_local_routed + num_fused_shared_experts
218	        self._has_fused_shared = num_fused_shared_experts > 0
219	        self._pending_fp8_shared_weights: dict[tuple[int, str], torch.Tensor] = {}
220	        self._pending_fp8_shared_scales: dict[tuple[int, str], torch.Tensor] = {}
221	
222	        assert intermediate_size % self.moe_tp_size == 0
223	        self.intermediate_size_per_partition = intermediate_size // self.moe_tp_size
224	        self.reduce_results = reduce_results
225	        self.use_presharded_weights = use_presharded_weights
226	
227	        self.use_triton_kernels = get_moe_runner_backend().is_triton_kernels()
228	
229	        self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe = (
230	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
231	            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
232	        )
233	        self.use_deep_gemm = get_moe_runner_backend().is_deep_gemm()
234	
235	        # flashinfer_trtllm kernel requires intermediate_size to be a multiple of 128
236	        # Pad the intermediate_size_per_partition if necessary
237	        if (
238	            self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe
239	            and self.intermediate_size_per_partition % 128 != 0
240	        ):
241	            self.intermediate_size_per_partition = round_up(
242	                self.intermediate_size_per_partition, 128
243	            )
244	
245	        self.quant_config = quant_config
246	        self.use_flashinfer_mxfp4_moe = get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_mxfp4()
247	        # TODO maybe we should remove this `if`, since `Mxfp4MoEMethod` does another round-up logic
248	        if (
249	            self.quant_config is not None
250	            and self.quant_config.get_name() == "mxfp4"
251	            and self.use_flashinfer_mxfp4_moe
252	        ):
253	            hidden_size = round_up(hidden_size, 256)
254	        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
255	
256	        self.moe_runner_config = MoeRunnerConfig(
257	            num_experts=num_experts,
258	            num_local_experts=self.num_local_experts,
259	            hidden_size=hidden_size,
260	            intermediate_size_per_partition=self.intermediate_size_per_partition,
261	            layer_id=layer_id,
262	            top_k=top_k,
263	            num_fused_shared_experts=num_fused_shared_experts,
264	            params_dtype=params_dtype,
265	            activation=activation,
266	            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,
267	            inplace=inplace,
268	            no_combine=no_combine,
269	            routed_scaling_factor=routed_scaling_factor,
270	            gemm1_alpha=gemm1_alpha,
271	            gemm1_clamp_limit=gemm1_clamp_limit,
272	            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,
273	            is_gated=is_gated,
274	            routing_method_type=routing_method_type,
275	            gate_up_interleaved=gate_up_interleaved,
276	        )
277	
278	        self.quant_method: Optional[FusedMoEMethodBase] = None
279	        server_args = get_global_server_args()
280	        kt_config = create_kt_config_from_server_args(server_args, layer_id)
281	        if kt_config is not None:
282	            if quant_config is not None:
283	                gpu_method = quant_config.get_quant_method(self, prefix)
284	            else:
285	                gpu_method = UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod(self.use_triton_kernels)
286	            self.quant_method = KTEPWrapperMethod(gpu_method, kt_config)
287	        else:
288	            if quant_config is not None:
289	                self.quant_method = quant_config.get_quant_method(self, prefix)
290	            if self.quant_method is None:
291	                self.quant_method = UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod(
292	                    self.use_triton_kernels,
293	                    self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe,
294	                    self.use_deep_gemm,
295	                )
296	        self.supports_deferred_finalize = (
297	            envs.SGLANG_ENABLE_MOE_DEFERRED_FINALIZE.get()
298	            and get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
299	            and isinstance(self.quant_method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)
300	        )
301	        print_info_once(
302	            "FlashInfer TRTLLM MoE deferred finalize is "
303	            f"{'enabled' if self.supports_deferred_finalize else 'disabled'} "
304	            f"(moe_runner_backend={server_args.moe_runner_backend}, "
305	            f"quant_method={type(self.quant_method).__name__})."
306	        )
307	
308	        self.quant_method.create_weights(
309	            layer=self,
310	            num_experts=self.num_local_experts,
311	            hidden_size=hidden_size,
312	            intermediate_size_per_partition=self.intermediate_size_per_partition,
313	            params_dtype=params_dtype,
314	            weight_loader=(
315	                self.weight_loader
316	                if not use_weight_loader_fused
317	                else self.weight_loader_fused
318	            ),
319	            with_bias=with_bias,
320	            moe_intermediate_size=intermediate_size,
321	        )
322	
323	        self.quant_method.create_moe_runner(self, self.moe_runner_config)
324	        self.dispatcher = create_moe_dispatcher(self.moe_runner_config)
325	        self._use_ascend_fuseep = get_moe_a2a_backend().is_ascend_fuseep()
326	
327	        if (
328	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
329	            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
330	        ):
331	            if self.moe_runner_config.inplace:
332	                print_info_once(
333	                    "Setting inplace to False for FlashInfer TRTLLM MoE backend."
334	                )
335	            self.moe_runner_config.inplace = False
336	
337	        self.should_fuse_routed_scaling_factor_in_topk = (
338	            isinstance(self.quant_method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)

class FusedMoE(torch.nn.Module):
    """FusedMoE layer for MoE models.

    This layer contains both MergedColumnParallel weights (gate_up_proj /
    w13) and RowParallelLinear weights (down_proj/ w2).

    Note: Mixtral uses w1, w2, and w3 for gate, up, and down_proj. We
    copy that naming convention here and handle any remapping in the
    load_weights function in each model implementation.

    Args:
        num_experts: Number of experts in the model
        top_k: Number of experts selected for each token
        hidden_size: Input hidden state size of the transformer
        intermediate_size: Intermediate size of the experts
        params_dtype: Data type for the parameters.
        reduce_results: Whether to apply all_reduce on the output of the layer
        quant_config: Quantization configuration.
        inplace: suggestion to compute inplace (modify input activation).
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        num_experts: int,
        hidden_size: int,
        intermediate_size: int,
        layer_id: int,
        top_k: Optional[int] = None,
        num_fused_shared_experts: int = 0,
        params_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,
        reduce_results: bool = False,
        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,
        prefix: str = "",
        activation: str = "silu",
        apply_router_weight_on_input: bool = False,
        use_presharded_weights: bool = False,
        inplace: bool = True,
        no_combine: bool = False,
        routed_scaling_factor: Optional[float] = None,
        gemm1_alpha: Optional[float] = None,
        gemm1_clamp_limit: Optional[float] = None,
        swiglu_limit: Optional[float] = None,
        use_weight_loader_fused: bool = False,
        with_bias=False,
        routing_method_type: Optional[RoutingMethodType] = None,
        is_gated: bool = True,
        gate_up_interleaved: bool = True,
    ):
        super().__init__()
        if params_dtype is None:
            params_dtype = torch.get_default_dtype()

        self.layer_id = layer_id
        self.top_k = top_k
        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
        self.num_experts = num_experts
        self.num_fused_shared_experts = num_fused_shared_experts

        self.enable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe = (
            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutlass()
        )
        self.moe_ep_size = get_parallel().moe_ep_size
        self.moe_ep_rank = get_parallel().moe_ep_rank
        self.moe_tp_size = get_parallel().moe_tp_size
        self.moe_tp_rank = get_parallel().moe_tp_rank

        # For fused shared experts, DeepEP-class and MegaMOE backends use
        # per-rank physical shared slots, while other backends keep fused
        # shared experts as global shared slots. When fusion is disabled,
        # num_fused_shared_experts is 0 and no shared slots are added here.
        if has_per_rank_fused_shared_slots(num_fused_shared_experts):
            num_shared_slots = num_fused_shared_experts * self.moe_ep_size
        else:
            num_shared_slots = num_fused_shared_experts

        assert (num_experts - num_shared_slots) % self.moe_ep_size == 0
        self._num_global_routed = num_experts - num_shared_slots
        self._num_local_routed = self._num_global_routed // self.moe_ep_size
        self.num_local_experts = self._num_local_routed + num_fused_shared_experts
        self._has_fused_shared = num_fused_shared_experts > 0
        self._pending_fp8_shared_weights: dict[tuple[int, str], torch.Tensor] = {}
        self._pending_fp8_shared_scales: dict[tuple[int, str], torch.Tensor] = {}

        assert intermediate_size % self.moe_tp_size == 0
        self.intermediate_size_per_partition = intermediate_size // self.moe_tp_size
        self.reduce_results = reduce_results
        self.use_presharded_weights = use_presharded_weights

        self.use_triton_kernels = get_moe_runner_backend().is_triton_kernels()

        self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe = (
            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
        )
        self.use_deep_gemm = get_moe_runner_backend().is_deep_gemm()

        # flashinfer_trtllm kernel requires intermediate_size to be a multiple of 128
        # Pad the intermediate_size_per_partition if necessary
        if (
            self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe
            and self.intermediate_size_per_partition % 128 != 0
        ):
            self.intermediate_size_per_partition = round_up(
                self.intermediate_size_per_partition, 128
            )

        self.quant_config = quant_config
        self.use_flashinfer_mxfp4_moe = get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_mxfp4()
        # TODO maybe we should remove this `if`, since `Mxfp4MoEMethod` does another round-up logic
        if (
            self.quant_config is not None
            and self.quant_config.get_name() == "mxfp4"
            and self.use_flashinfer_mxfp4_moe
        ):
            hidden_size = round_up(hidden_size, 256)
        self.hidden_size = hidden_size

        self.moe_runner_config = MoeRunnerConfig(
            num_experts=num_experts,
            num_local_experts=self.num_local_experts,
            hidden_size=hidden_size,
            intermediate_size_per_partition=self.intermediate_size_per_partition,
            layer_id=layer_id,
            top_k=top_k,
            num_fused_shared_experts=num_fused_shared_experts,
            params_dtype=params_dtype,
            activation=activation,
            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,
            inplace=inplace,
            no_combine=no_combine,
            routed_scaling_factor=routed_scaling_factor,
            gemm1_alpha=gemm1_alpha,
            gemm1_clamp_limit=gemm1_clamp_limit,
            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,
            is_gated=is_gated,
            routing_method_type=routing_method_type,
            gate_up_interleaved=gate_up_interleaved,
        )

        self.quant_method: Optional[FusedMoEMethodBase] = None
        server_args = get_global_server_args()
        kt_config = create_kt_config_from_server_args(server_args, layer_id)
        if kt_config is not None:
            if quant_config is not None:
                gpu_method = quant_config.get_quant_method(self, prefix)
            else:
                gpu_method = UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod(self.use_triton_kernels)
            self.quant_method = KTEPWrapperMethod(gpu_method, kt_config)
        else:
            if quant_config is not None:
                self.quant_method = quant_config.get_quant_method(self, prefix)
            if self.quant_method is None:
                self.quant_method = UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod(
                    self.use_triton_kernels,
                    self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe,
                    self.use_deep_gemm,
                )
        self.supports_deferred_finalize = (
            envs.SGLANG_ENABLE_MOE_DEFERRED_FINALIZE.get()
            and get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
            and isinstance(self.quant_method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)
        )
        print_info_once(
            "FlashInfer TRTLLM MoE deferred finalize is "
            f"{'enabled' if self.supports_deferred_finalize else 'disabled'} "
            f"(moe_runner_backend={server_args.moe_runner_backend}, "
            f"quant_method={type(self.quant_method).__name__})."
        )

        self.quant_method.create_weights(
            layer=self,
            num_experts=self.num_local_experts,
            hidden_size=hidden_size,
            intermediate_size_per_partition=self.intermediate_size_per_partition,
            params_dtype=params_dtype,
            weight_loader=(
                self.weight_loader
                if not use_weight_loader_fused
                else self.weight_loader_fused
            ),
            with_bias=with_bias,
            moe_intermediate_size=intermediate_size,
        )

        self.quant_method.create_moe_runner(self, self.moe_runner_config)
        self.dispatcher = create_moe_dispatcher(self.moe_runner_config)
        self._use_ascend_fuseep = get_moe_a2a_backend().is_ascend_fuseep()

        if (
            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
        ):
            if self.moe_runner_config.inplace:
                print_info_once(
                    "Setting inplace to False for FlashInfer TRTLLM MoE backend."
                )
            self.moe_runner_config.inplace = False

        self.should_fuse_routed_scaling_factor_in_topk = (
            isinstance(self.quant_method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	import logging
4	import os
5	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any, Optional
6	
7	from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.base import (
8	    FusedOpPool,
9	    MoeRunnerConfig,
10	    PermuteMethodPool,
11	)
12	from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.deep_gemm import DeepGemmRunnerCore
13	from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton import TritonRunnerCore
14	from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_kernels import TritonKernelsRunnerCore
15	from sglang.srt.layers.moe.utils import get_moe_a2a_backend
16	
17	if TYPE_CHECKING:
18	    from sglang.srt.batch_overlap.single_batch_overlap import DownGemmOverlapArgs
19	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.base import MoeQuantInfo
20	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.base import CombineInput, DispatchOutput
21	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.utils import MoeRunnerBackend
22	    from sglang.srt.lora.lora_moe_runners import LoRAHooks
23	
24	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
25	
26	
27	class MoeRunner:
28	    def __init__(
29	        self,
30	        runner_backend: MoeRunnerBackend,
31	        config: MoeRunnerConfig,
32	        lora_enabled: bool = False,
33	    ):
34	        self.runner_backend = runner_backend
35	        self.config = config
36	        self.lora_enabled = lora_enabled
37	
38	        self.fused_func = None
39	
40	        if runner_backend.is_triton():
41	            self.runner_core = TritonRunnerCore(config)
42	        elif runner_backend.is_triton_kernels():
43	            self.runner_core = TritonKernelsRunnerCore(config)
44	        elif runner_backend.is_deep_gemm():
45	            self.runner_core = DeepGemmRunnerCore(config)
46	        elif runner_backend.is_aiter():
47	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.aiter import AiterRunnerCore
48	
49	            self.runner_core = AiterRunnerCore(config)
50	        elif runner_backend.is_marlin():
51	            if lora_enabled:
52	                from sglang.srt.lora.lora_moe_runner_marlin import MarlinLoraRunnerCore
53	
54	                self.runner_core = MarlinLoraRunnerCore(config)
55	            else:
56	                self.runner_core = None  # Marlin only supports fused path
57	        elif (
58	            runner_backend.is_flashinfer_trtllm()
59	            or runner_backend.is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
60	        ):
61	            self.runner_core = None  # FlashInfer TRT-LLM only supports fused path
62	        elif runner_backend.is_flashinfer_cutedsl():
63	            self.runner_core = None  # FlashInfer CuteDSL only supports fused path
64	        elif runner_backend.is_flashinfer_cutlass():
65	            self.runner_core = None  # FlashInfer CUTLASS only supports fused path
66	        elif runner_backend.is_flashinfer_mxfp4():
67	            self.runner_core = None  # FlashInfer MXFP4 only supports fused path
68	        elif runner_backend.is_cutlass():
69	            self.runner_core = None  # CUTLASS uses the direct cutlass_moe_fp4 path
70	        else:
71	            raise NotImplementedError(f"Unsupported runner backend: {runner_backend}")
72	
73	        # Skip fused func if LoRA is enabled (LoRA requires non-fused path)
74	        if not lora_enabled:
75	            a2a_backend_name = get_moe_a2a_backend().value
76	            runner_backend_name = runner_backend.value
77	
78	            # TODO(cwan): add a server argument to disable fused func
79	            self.fused_func = FusedOpPool.get_fused_func(
80	                a2a_backend_name, runner_backend_name
81	            )
82	
83	            if self.runner_core is None and self.fused_func is None:
84	                raise NotImplementedError(
85	                    f"Runner backend {runner_backend} requires a fused func for a2a backend "
86	                    f"{a2a_backend_name}, but none is registered."
87	                )
88	
89	        self.down_gemm_overlap_args: Optional[DownGemmOverlapArgs] = None
90	        self.meta_overlap_args: Optional[dict] = None
91	
92	        SGLANG_CI_DISABLE_MOE_FUSED_FUNC = os.environ.get(
93	            "SGLANG_CI_DISABLE_MOE_FUSED_FUNC", "0"
94	        )
95	        if SGLANG_CI_DISABLE_MOE_FUSED_FUNC == "1":
96	            logger.info(
97	                "SGLANG_CI_DISABLE_MOE_FUSED_FUNC is set to 1, disabling fused func"
98	            )
99	            self.fused_func = None
100	
101	    def run(
102	        self, dispatch_output: DispatchOutput, quant_info: MoeQuantInfo, lora_info=None
103	    ) -> CombineInput:
104	        if self.fused_func is not None and not self.lora_enabled:
105	            return self.fused_func(dispatch_output, quant_info, self.config)
106	
107	        assert self.runner_core is not None
108	
109	        def _maybe_build_lora_hooks(_runner_input: Any) -> LoRAHooks:
110	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.base import DispatchOutput
111	            from sglang.srt.lora.lora_moe_runners import build_lora_hooks
112	
113	            if isinstance(_runner_input, DispatchOutput):
114	                hidden_states, topk_ids = (
115	                    _runner_input.hidden_states,
116	                    _runner_input.topk_output.topk_ids,
117	                )
118	            else:
119	                hidden_states = _runner_input.hidden_states
120	                topk_ids = getattr(_runner_input, "topk_ids", None)
121	            if self.lora_enabled and lora_info is not None:
122	                return build_lora_hooks(
123	                    hidden_states,
124	                    lora_info,
125	                    topk_ids,
126	                )
127	            return None
128	
129	        # Runners that handle dispatch_output directly (e.g., MarlinRunnerCore)
130	        # bypass the pre-permute step and do their own alignment internally.
131	        if hasattr(self.runner_core, "run_from_dispatch"):
132	            hooks = _maybe_build_lora_hooks(dispatch_output)
133	            return self.runner_core.run_from_dispatch(
134	                dispatch_output, quant_info, self.config, hooks=hooks
135	            )
136	
137	        dispatch_format = dispatch_output.format.value
138	        runner_format = self.runner_core.runner_backend.value
139	        self.pre_permute_func = PermuteMethodPool.get_pre_permute(
140	            dispatch_format, runner_format
141	        )
142	
143	        running_state = {}
144	        if self.down_gemm_overlap_args is not None:
145	            running_state["down_gemm_overlap_args"] = self.down_gemm_overlap_args
146	        if self.meta_overlap_args is not None:
147	            running_state["meta_overlap_args"] = self.meta_overlap_args
148	
149	        runner_input = self.pre_permute_func(
150	            dispatch_output, quant_info, self.config, running_state
151	        )
152	
153	        hooks = _maybe_build_lora_hooks(runner_input)
154	
155	        runner_output = self.runner_core.run(
156	            runner_input, quant_info, running_state, hooks=hooks
157	        )
158	        runner_format = self.runner_core.runner_backend.value
159	        combine_format = dispatch_output.format.value
160	        self.post_permute_func = PermuteMethodPool.get_post_permute(
161	            runner_format, combine_format
162	        )
163	        combine_input = self.post_permute_func(
164	            runner_output, quant_info, self.config, running_state
165	        )
166	
167	        return combine_input
168	
169	    def set_overlap_args(
170	        self, down_gemm_overlap_args: DownGemmOverlapArgs, meta_overlap_args: dict
171	    ):
172	        self.down_gemm_overlap_args = down_gemm_overlap_args
173	        self.meta_overlap_args = meta_overlap_args
174	
175	    def clear_overlap_args(self) -> None:
176	        self.down_gemm_overlap_args = None
177	        self.meta_overlap_args = None
178

steps.message: Good, the GEMM/kernel agent is back. Let me now look at the attention backend selection for AMD to understand what's used by default.

results.content:
4309	    def _get_default_attn_backend(self, use_mla_backend: bool, model_config):
4310	        """
4311	        Auto select the fastest attention backend.
4312	
4313	        1. Models with MHA Architecture (e.g: Llama, QWen)
4314	            1.1 We will turn on FA3 on hopper unless user use spec decode with topk > 1 or page_size > 1.
4315	            1.2 Use trtllm_mha for SM100/SM103 (Blackwell B200/GB200/B300) excluding spec with topk > 1.
4316	               Note: trtllm_mha does not support SM120, which will fall back to flashinfer.
4317	            1.3 In other cases, we will use flashinfer if available, otherwise use triton.
4318	        2. Models with MLA Architecture and using FA3
4319	            2.1 We will use FA3 backend on hopper.
4320	            2.2 We will use Flashinfer backend on blackwell.
4321	            2.3 Otherwise, we will use triton backend.
4322	        """
4323	        # OOT platforms provide their own default attention backend.
4324	        if current_platform.is_out_of_tree():
4325	            return current_platform.get_default_attention_backend()
4326	
4327	        # Whisper requires flashinfer for cross-attention CUDA graph support.
4328	        if "WhisperForConditionalGeneration" in (
4329	            model_config.hf_config.architectures or []
4330	        ):
4331	            return "flashinfer"
4332	
4333	        if not use_mla_backend:
4334	            # MHA architecture
4335	            from sglang.srt.arg_groups.overrides import resolved_view
4336	
4337	            if is_hopper_with_cuda_12_3() and is_no_spec_infer_or_topk_one(
4338	                resolved_view(self)
4339	            ):
4340	                # Note: flashinfer 0.6.1 caused performance regression on Hopper attention kernel
4341	                # Before the kernel is fixed, we choose fa3 as the default backend on Hopper MHA
4342	                # ref: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/issues/17411
4343	                return "fa3"
4344	            elif (
4345	                is_sm100_supported()
4346	                and is_no_spec_infer_or_topk_one(resolved_view(self))
4347	                and (
4348	                    self.speculative_algorithm is None
4349	                    or self.speculative_eagle_topk is not None
4350	                )
4351	            ):
4352	                return "trtllm_mha"
4353	            elif is_hip():
4354	                return "aiter"
4355	            elif is_mps():
4356	                return "torch_native"
4357	            else:
4358	                # FlashInfer does not support attention sinks.
4359	                if is_flashinfer_available() and not model_config.has_attention_sinks:
4360	                    return "flashinfer"
4361	                return "triton"
4362	        else:
4363	            # MLA architecture
4364	            if is_hopper_with_cuda_12_3():
4365	                return "fa3"
4366	            elif is_sm100_supported():
4367	                return "flashinfer"
4368	            elif is_hip():
4369	                head_num = model_config.get_num_kv_heads(self.tp_size)
4370	                # TODO current aiter only support head number 16 or 128 head number
4371	                if head_num == 128 or head_num == 16:
4372	                    return "aiter"
4373	                else:
4374	                    return "triton"
4375	            elif is_mps():
4376	                return "torch_native"
4377	            else:
4378	                return "triton"
4379	
4380	    def _handle_attention_backend_compatibility(self):
4381	        model_config = self.get_model_config()
4382	
4383	        # The attention_backend write clusters of this handler moved to the
4384	        # resolution pipeline (arg_groups/overrides.py), each invoked below at
4385	        # its legacy slot; the interleaved non-attention adjustments stay.
4386	        from sglang.srt.arg_groups.overrides import (
4387	            _attention_backend_default,
4388	            _attention_backend_dual_chunk,
4389	            _attention_backend_fa3_fp8_fallback,
4390	            _attention_backend_platform_fallbacks,
4391	            _fa4_page_constraint,
4392	            _intel_xpu_page_constraint,
4393	            _mla_backend_page_constraints,
4394	            resolved_view,
4395	            run_post_process_pass,
4396	        )
4397	
4398	        # Split-backend override + default fill.
4399	        run_post_process_pass(self, _attention_backend_default)
4400	
4401	        # Torch native and flex attention backends
4402	        attention_backend = resolved_view(self).attention_backend
4403	        if attention_backend == "torch_native":
4404	            logger.warning(
4405	                "Cuda graph is disabled because of using torch native attention backend"
4406	            )
4407	            self.cuda_graph_config.decode.backend = Backend.DISABLED
4408	            self.cuda_graph_config.prefill.backend = Backend.DISABLED

Split-backend override + default fill.\n        run_post_process_pass(self, _attention_backend_default)\n\n        # Torch native and flex attention backends\n        attention_backend = resolved_view(self).attention_backend\n        if attention_backend == \"torch_native\":\n            logger.warning(\n                \"Cuda graph is disabled because of using torch native attention backend\"\n            )\n            self.cuda_graph_config.decode.backend = Backend.DISABLED\n            self.cuda_graph_config.prefill.backend = Backend.DISABLED", "numLines": 100, "startLine": 4309, "totalLines": 7325}}

from __future__ import annotations

from sglang.srt.runtime_context import get_parallel

"""
end to end attention solution with aiter kernels
"""

import logging
from dataclasses import dataclass
from enum import Enum, auto
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Optional

import torch
import triton

from sglang.srt.layers.attention.base_attn_backend import AttentionBackend
from sglang.srt.layers.attention.triton_ops.aiter_unified_attention import (
    scatter_ragged_to_page_table_kernel,
    scatter_req_to_token_to_page_table_kernel,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.attention.utils import (
    assert_buffer_fits,
    create_flashinfer_kv_indices_triton,
    create_flashmla_kv_indices_triton,
    get_num_kv_index_blocks_flashmla,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.dp_attention import (
    is_dp_attention_enabled,
)
from sglang.srt.model_executor.forward_batch_info import ForwardBatch, ForwardMode
from sglang.srt.speculative.spec_utils import (
    draft_kv_indices_buffer_width,
    draft_kv_indices_used_len,
    generate_draft_decode_kv_indices,
)
from sglang.srt.utils import is_gfx95_supported

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from sglang.srt.layers.radix_attention import RadixAttention
    from sglang.srt.model_executor.model_runner import ModelRunner
    from sglang.srt.speculative.spec_info import SpecInput

try:
    from aiter import (
        flash_attn_varlen_func,
        get_mla_metadata_info_v1,
        get_mla_metadata_v1,
        get_ps_metadata_info_v1,
        get_ps_metadata_v1,
        mha_batch_prefill_func,
        mla_prefill_ps_asm_fwd,
        mla_reduce_v1,
        paged_attention_ragged,
    )
    from aiter.mla import mla_decode_fwd, mla_prefill_fwd
    from aiter.ops.triton.attention.unified_attention import unified_attention
except ImportError:
    print(
        "aiter is AMD specific kernel library. Please make sure aiter is installed on your AMD device."
    )

from sglang.srt.configs.model_config import AttentionArch
from sglang.srt.layers.attention.aiter_utils import (
    forward_decode_vectorized_5d,
    forward_extend_vectorized_5d,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.attention.utils import (
    launch_reshape_and_cache_flash,
    pad_sequence_with_mask,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.quantization.fp8_kernel import fp8_dtype
from sglang.srt.mem_cache.memory_pool import KVWriteLoc
from sglang.srt.mem_cache.swa_memory_pool import SWAKVPool
from sglang.srt.utils import get_bool_env_var

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# Use aiter mla persist design for fp8-kv cache
_use_mla_ps_kernel = get_bool_env_var("SGLANG_AITER_MLA_PERSIST", "True")

# Use fp8 prefill only on gfx95
_use_fp8_prefill_attn = (
    get_bool_env_var("SGLANG_AITER_FP8_PREFILL_ATTN", "True") and is_gfx95_supported()
)

# Persist
# fast_mode=True if _use_mla_ps_kernel else False
# intra_batch_mode=False if _use_mla_ps_kernel else True

# fake non-ps, intra_batch_mode needs to be True for non-ps-mode
fast_mode = False
intra_batch_mode = True if _use_mla_ps_kernel else False


class WrapperDispatch(Enum):
    SLIDING_WINDOW = auto()
    CROSS_ATTENTION = auto()

steps.message:
`SGLANG_USE_AITER=1` is already set. So aiter is active. Now let me understand the overall picture:

1. **MoE**: 128 experts, top_k=8, intermediate_size=704. Since 704 % 128 != 0, aiter CK MoE is NOT supported, so it falls back to Triton MoE.
2. **Attention**: aiter backend (good for AMD)
3. **GEMM**: With SGLANG_USE_AITER=1, uses aiter tuned GEMMs

Let me now look at what's in the Triton MoE runner and see where optimizations can be made. Also, let me check how the existing server performs.

61	    use_int8_w8a8: bool = False
62	    use_int8_w8a16: bool = False
63	    use_int4_w4a16: bool = False
64	    per_channel_quant: bool = False
65	    w13_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
66	    w2_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
67	    w13_zp: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
68	    w2_zp: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
69	    a13_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
70	    a2_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
71	    block_shape: Optional[List[int]] = None
72

74	class TritonRunnerCore(MoeRunnerCore):
75	
76	    def __init__(self, config: MoeRunnerConfig):
77	        super().__init__(config)
78	
79	    def run(
80	        self,
81	        runner_input: TritonRunnerInput,
82	        quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
83	        running_state: dict,
84	        hooks: Optional[Any] = None,
85	    ) -> TritonRunnerOutput:
86	        if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_hip() and is_gfx95_supported():
87	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.mxfp8_moe_amd_gfx95 import (
88	                fused_experts_mxfp8,
89	            )
90	
91	            out = fused_experts_mxfp8(
92	                runner_input.hidden_states,
93	                quant_info.w13_weight,
94	                quant_info.w2_weight,
95	                runner_input.topk_weights,
96	                runner_input.topk_ids,
97	                quant_info.w13_scale,
98	                quant_info.w2_scale,
99	                b1=quant_info.b13,
100	                b2=quant_info.b2,
101	                activation=self.config.activation,
102	                is_gated=self.config.is_gated,
103	                no_combine=self.config.no_combine,
104	                inplace=self.config.inplace,
105	                apply_router_weight_on_input=self.config.apply_router_weight_on_input,
106	                routed_scaling_factor=self.config.routed_scaling_factor,
107	                gemm1_alpha=self.config.gemm1_alpha,
108	                gemm1_limit=self.config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
109	                swiglu_limit=self.config.swiglu_limit,
110	                gate_up_interleaved=self.config.gate_up_interleaved,
111	            )
112	            return TritonRunnerOutput(hidden_states=out)
113	
114	        if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_cuda():
115	            raise NotImplementedError(
116	                "Triton MoE runner does not support NVIDIA MXFP8; use "
117	                "--moe-runner-backend deep_gemm (or flashinfer_trtllm/cutlass)."
118	            )
119	
120	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.fused_moe import (
121	            _fused_moe_kernel_sequence,
122	        )
123	
124	        filter_expert = (
125	            self.config.num_experts is None
126	            or self.config.num_experts != self.config.num_local_experts
127	        )
128	
129	        out = _fused_moe_kernel_sequence(
130	            runner_input.hidden_states,
131	            quant_info.w13_weight,
132	            quant_info.w2_weight,
133	            runner_input.topk_weights,
134	            runner_input.topk_ids,
135	            runner_input.sorted_token_ids,
136	            runner_input.expert_ids,
137	            runner_input.num_tokens_post_padded,
138	            running_state["config"],
139	            running_state.get("down_config"),
140	            running_state.get("down_moe_use_tma", False),
141	            b1=quant_info.b13,
142	            b2=quant_info.b2,
143	            use_fp8_w8a8=quant_info.use_fp8_w8a8,
144	            use_int8_w8a8=quant_info.use_int8_w8a8,
145	            use_int8_w8a16=quant_info.use_int8_w8a16,
146	            use_int4_w4a16=quant_info.use_int4_w4a16,
147	            per_channel_quant=quant_info.per_channel_quant,
148	            w1_scale=quant_info.w13_scale,
149	            w2_scale=quant_info.w2_scale,
150	            w1_zp=quant_info.w13_zp,
151	            w2_zp=quant_info.w2_zp,
152	            a1_scale=quant_info.a13_scale,
153	            a2_scale=quant_info.a2_scale,
154	            block_shape=quant_info.block_shape,
155	            activation=self.config.activation,
156	            is_gated=self.config.is_gated,
157	            no_combine=self.config.no_combine,
158	            inplace=self.config.inplace,
159	            apply_router_weight_on_input=self.config.apply_router_weight_on_input,
160	            routed_scaling_factor=self.config.routed_scaling_factor,
161	            gemm1_alpha=self.config.gemm1_alpha,
162	            gemm1_limit=self.config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
163	            filter_expert=filter_expert,
164	            hooks=hooks,
165	            swiglu_limit=self.config.swiglu_limit,
166	        )
167	
168	        return TritonRunnerOutput(hidden_states=out)
169	
170	    @property
171	    def runner_backend(self) -> MoeRunnerBackend:
172	        return MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON

176	def fused_experts_none_to_triton(

192	            w2=quant_info.w2_weight,
193	            topk_weights=topk_weights,
194	            topk_ids=topk_ids,
195	            w1_scale=quant_info.w13_scale,
196	            w2_scale=quant_info.w2_scale,
197	            b1=quant_info.b13,
198	            b2=quant_info.b2,
199	            activation=runner_config.activation,

201	            no_combine=runner_config.no_combine,

203	            apply_router_weight_on_input=runner_config.apply_router_weight_on_input,
204	            routed_scaling_factor=runner_config.routed_scaling_factor,
205	            gemm1_alpha=runner_config.gemm1_alpha,
206	            gemm1_limit=runner_config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
207	            swiglu_limit=runner_config.swiglu_limit,
208	            gate_up_interleaved=runner_config.gate_up_interleaved,
209	        )
210	    else:
211	        if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_cuda():
212	            raise NotImplementedError(
213	                "Triton MoE runner does not support NVIDIA MXFP8; use "
214	                "--moe-runner-backend deep_gemm (or flashinfer_trtllm/cutlass)."
215	            )
216	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.fused_moe import (
217	            fused_experts,
218	        )
219	
220	        output = fused_experts(
221	            hidden_states=dispatch_output.hidden_states,
222	            w1=quant_info.w13_weight,
223	            w2=quant_info.w2_weight,
224	            topk_output=dispatch_output.topk_output,
225	            moe_runner_config=runner_config,
226	            b1=quant_info.b13,
227	            b2=quant_info.b2,
228	            use_fp8_w8a8=quant_info.use_fp8_w8a8,
229	            use_int8_w8a8=quant_info.use_int8_w8a8,
230	            use_int8_w8a16=quant_info.use_int8_w8a16,
231	            use_int4_w4a16=quant_info.use_int4_w4a16,
232	            per_channel_quant=quant_info.per_channel_quant,
233	            w1_scale=quant_info.w13_scale,
234	            w2_scale=quant_info.w2_scale,
235	            w1_zp=quant_info.w13_zp,
236	            w2_zp=quant_info.w2_zp,
237	            a1_scale=quant_info.a13_scale,
238	            a2_scale=quant_info.a2_scale,
239	            block_shape=quant_info.block_shape,
240	        )
241	
242	    return StandardCombineInput(
243	        hidden_states=output,
244	    )

247	@register_pre_permute("standard", "triton")
248	def pre_permute_standard_to_triton(
249	    dispatch_output: StandardDispatchOutput,
250	    quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
251	    runner_config: MoeRunnerConfig,
252	    running_state: dict,
253	) -> TritonRunnerInput:
254	
255	    # Registered fallback for format-conversion tests and examples.
256	
257	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.fused_moe import (
258	        _prepare_fused_moe_run,
259	    )
260	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.topk import TopKOutputChecker
261	
262	    hidden_states, topk_output = (
263	        dispatch_output.hidden_states,
264	        dispatch_output.topk_output,
265	    )
266	
267	    assert TopKOutputChecker.format_is_standard(topk_output)
268	
269	    (
270	        config,
271	        down_config,
272	        down_moe_use_tma,
273	        sorted_token_ids,
274	        expert_ids,
275	        num_tokens_post_padded,
276	    ) = _prepare_fused_moe_run(
277	        hidden_states,
278	        quant_info.w13_weight,
279	        quant_info.w2_weight,
280	        topk_output.topk_ids,
281	        use_fp8_w8a8=quant_info.use_fp8_w8a8,
282	        use_int8_w8a8=quant_info.use_int8_w8a8,
283	        use_int8_w8a16=quant_info.use_int8_w8a16,
284	        use_int4_w4a16=quant_info.use_int4_w4a16,
285	        per_channel_quant=quant_info.per_channel_quant,
286	        block_shape=quant_info.block_shape,
287	    )
288	
289	    running_state["config"] = config
290	    running_state["down_config"] = down_config
291	    running_state["down_moe_use_tma"] = down_moe_use_tma
292	
293	    return TritonRunnerInput(
294	        hidden_states=hidden_states,
295	        topk_weights=topk_output.topk_weights,
296	        topk_ids=topk_output.topk_ids,
297	        sorted_token_ids=sorted_token_ids,
298	        expert_ids=expert_ids,
299	        num_tokens_post_padded=num_tokens_post_padded,
300	    )
301	
302	
303	@register_post_permute("triton", "standard")
304	def post_permute_triton_to_standard(
305	    runner_output: TritonRunnerOutput,
306	    quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
307	    runner_config: MoeRunnerConfig,
308	    running_state: dict,
309	) -> StandardCombineInput:
310	
311	    # Registered fallback for format-conversion tests and examples.
312	
313	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.standard import StandardCombineInput
314	
315	    return StandardCombineInput(
316	        hidden_states=runner_output.hidden_states,
317	    )

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any, List, Optional

import torch

from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.base import (
    MoeQuantInfo,
    MoeRunnerConfig,
    MoeRunnerCore,
    RunnerInput,
    RunnerOutput,
    register_fused_func,
    register_post_permute,
    register_pre_permute,
)
from sglang.srt.layers.moe.utils import MoeRunnerBackend
from sglang.srt.utils import is_cuda, is_gfx95_supported, is_hip

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.standard import (
        StandardCombineInput,
        StandardDispatchOutput,
    )


@dataclass
class TritonRunnerInput(RunnerInput):

    hidden_states: torch.Tensor
    topk_weights: torch.Tensor
    topk_ids: torch.Tensor
    sorted_token_ids: torch.Tensor
    expert_ids: torch.Tensor
    num_tokens_post_padded: torch.Tensor

    @property
    def runner_backend(self) -> MoeRunnerBackend:
        return MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON


@dataclass
class TritonRunnerOutput(RunnerOutput):

    hidden_states: torch.Tensor

    @property
    def runner_backend(self) -> MoeRunnerBackend:
        return MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON


@dataclass
class TritonMoeQuantInfo(MoeQuantInfo):
    w13_weight: torch.Tensor
    w2_weight: torch.Tensor
    b13: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    b2: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    use_mxfp8: bool = False
    use_fp8_w8a8: bool = False
    use_int8_w8a8: bool = False
    use_int8_w8a16: bool = False
    use_int4_w4a16: bool = False
    per_channel_quant: bool = False
    w13_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    w2_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    w13_zp: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    w2_zp: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    a13_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    a2_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None
    block_shape: Optional[List[int]] = None


class TritonRunnerCore(MoeRunnerCore):

    def __init__(self, config: MoeRunnerConfig):
        super().__init__(config)

    def run(
        self,
        runner_input: TritonRunnerInput,
        quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
        running_state: dict,
        hooks: Optional[Any] = None,
    ) -> TritonRunnerOutput:
        if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_hip() and is_gfx95_supported():
            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.mxfp8_moe_amd_gfx95 import (
                fused_experts_mxfp8,
            )

            out = fused_experts_mxfp8(
                runner_input.hidden_states,
                quant_info.w13_weight,
                quant_info.w2_weight,
                runner_input.topk_weights,
                runner_input.topk_ids,
                quant_info.w13_scale,
                quant_info.w2_scale,
                b1=quant_info.b13,
                b2=quant_info.b2,
                activation=self.config.activation,
                is_gated=self.config.is_gated,
                no_combine=self.config.no_combine,
                inplace=self.config.inplace,
                apply_router_weight_on_input=self.config.apply_router_weight_on_input,
                routed_scaling_factor=self.config.routed_scaling_factor,
                gemm1_alpha=self.config.gemm1_alpha,
                gemm1_limit=self.config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
                swiglu_limit=self.config.swiglu_limit,
                gate_up_interleaved=self.config.gate_up_interleaved,
            )
            return TritonRunnerOutput(hidden_states=out)

        if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_cuda():
            raise NotImplementedError(
                "Triton MoE runner does not support NVIDIA MXFP8; use "
                "--moe-runner-backend deep_gemm (or flashinfer_trtllm/cutlass)."
            )

        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.fused_moe import (
            _fused_moe_kernel_sequence,
        )

        filter_expert = (
            self.config.num_experts is None
            or self.config.num_experts != self.config.num_local_experts
        )

        out = _fused_moe_kernel_sequence(
            runner_input.hidden_states,
            quant_info.w13_weight,
            quant_info.w2_weight,
            runner_input.topk_weights,
            runner_input.topk_ids,
            runner_input.sorted_token_ids,
            runner_input.expert_ids,
            runner_input.num_tokens_post_padded,
            running_state["config"],
            running_state.get("down_config"),
            running_state.get("down_moe_use_tma", False),
            b1=quant_info.b13,
            b2=quant_info.b2,
            use_fp8_w8a8=quant_info.use_fp8_w8a8,
            use_int8_w8a8=quant_info.use_int8_w8a8,
            use_int8_w8a16=quant_info.use_int8_w8a16,
            use_int4_w4a16=quant_info.use_int4_w4a16,
            per_channel_quant=quant_info.per_channel_quant,
            w1_scale=quant_info.w13_scale,
            w2_scale=quant_info.w2_scale,
            w1_zp=quant_info.w13_zp,
            w2_zp=quant_info.w2_zp,
            a1_scale=quant_info.a13_scale,
            a2_scale=quant_info.a2_scale,
            block_shape=quant_info.block_shape,
            activation=self.config.activation,
            is_gated=self.config.is_gated,
            no_combine=self.config.no_combine,
            inplace=self.config.inplace,
            apply_router_weight_on_input=self.config.apply_router_weight_on_input,
            routed_scaling_factor=self.config.routed_scaling_factor,
            gemm1_alpha=self.config.gemm1_alpha,
            gemm1_limit=self.config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
            filter_expert=filter_expert,
            hooks=hooks,
            swiglu_limit=self.config.swiglu_limit,
        )

        return TritonRunnerOutput(hidden_states=out)

    @property
    def runner_backend(self) -> MoeRunnerBackend:
        return MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON


@register_fused_func("none", "triton")
def fused_experts_none_to_triton(
    dispatch_output: StandardDispatchOutput,
    quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
    runner_config: MoeRunnerConfig,
) -> StandardCombineInput:
    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.standard import StandardCombineInput

    if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_hip() and is_gfx95_supported():
        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.mxfp8_moe_amd_gfx95 import (
            fused_experts_mxfp8,
        )

        topk_weights, topk_ids, _ = dispatch_output.topk_output
        output = fused_experts_mxfp8(
            hidden_states=dispatch_output.hidden_states,
            w1=quant_info.w13_weight,
            w2=quant_info.w2_weight,
            topk_weights=topk_weights,
            topk_ids=topk_ids,
            w1_scale=quant_info.w13_scale,
            w2_scale=quant_info.w2_scale,
            b1=quant_info.b13,
            b2=quant_info.b2,
            activation=runner_config.activation,
            is_gated=runner_config.is_gated,
            no_combine=runner_config.no_combine,
            inplace=runner_config.inplace,
            apply_router_weight_on_input=runner_config.apply_router_weight_on_input,
            routed_scaling_factor=runner_config.routed_scaling_factor,
            gemm1_alpha=runner_config.gemm1_alpha,
            gemm1_limit=runner_config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
            swiglu_limit=runner_config.swiglu_limit,
            gate_up_interleaved=runner_config.gate_up_interleaved,
        )
    else:
        if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_cuda():
            raise NotImplementedError(
                "Triton MoE runner does not support NVIDIA MXFP8; use "
                "--moe-runner-backend deep_gemm (or flashinfer_trtllm/cutlass)."
            )
        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.fused_moe import (
            fused_experts,
        )

        output = fused_experts(
            hidden_states=dispatch_output.hidden_states,
            w1=quant_info.w13_weight,
            w2=quant_info.w2_weight,
            topk_output=dispatch_output.topk_output,
            moe_runner_config=runner_config,
            b1=quant_info.b13,
            b2=quant_info.b2,
            use_fp8_w8a8=quant_info.use_fp8_w8a8,
            use_int8_w8a8=quant_info.use_int8_w8a8,
            use_int8_w8a16=quant_info.use_int8_w8a16,
            use_int4_w4a16=quant_info.use_int4_w4a16,
            per_channel_quant=quant_info.per_channel_quant,
            w1_scale=quant_info.w13_scale,
            w2_scale=quant_info.w2_scale,
            w1_zp=quant_info.w13_zp,
            w2_zp=quant_info.w2_zp,
            a1_scale=quant_info.a13_scale,
            a2_scale=quant_info.a2_scale,
            block_shape=quant_info.block_shape,
        )

    return StandardCombineInput(
        hidden_states=output,
    )


@register_pre_permute("standard", "triton")
def pre_permute_standard_to_triton(
    dispatch_output: StandardDispatchOutput,
    quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
    runner_config: MoeRunnerConfig,
    running_state: dict,
) -> TritonRunnerInput:

    # Registered fallback for format-conversion tests and examples.

    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils.fused_moe import (
        _prepare_fused_moe_run,
    )
    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.topk import TopKOutputChecker

    hidden_states, topk_output = (
        dispatch_output.hidden_states,
        dispatch_output.topk_output,
    )

    assert TopKOutputChecker.format_is_standard(topk_output)

    (
        config,
        down_config,
        down_moe_use_tma,
        sorted_token_ids,
        expert_ids,
        num_tokens_post_padded,
    ) = _prepare_fused_moe_run(
        hidden_states,
        quant_info.w13_weight,
        quant_info.w2_weight,
        topk_output.topk_ids,
        use_fp8_w8a8=quant_info.use_fp8_w8a8,
        use_int8_w8a8=quant_info.use_int8_w8a8,
        use_int8_w8a16=quant_info.use_int8_w8a16,
        use_int4_w4a16=quant_info.use_int4_w4a16,
        per_channel_quant=quant_info.per_channel_quant,
        block_shape=quant_info.block_shape,
    )

    running_state["config"] = config
    running_state["down_config"] = down_config
    running_state["down_moe_use_tma"] = down_moe_use_tma

    return TritonRunnerInput(
        hidden_states=hidden_states,
        topk_weights=topk_output.topk_weights,
        topk_ids=topk_output.topk_ids,
        sorted_token_ids=sorted_token_ids,
        expert_ids=expert_ids,
        num_tokens_post_padded=num_tokens_post_padded,
    )


@register_post_permute("triton", "standard")
def post_permute_triton_to_standard(
    runner_output: TritonRunnerOutput,
    quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
    runner_config: MoeRunnerConfig,
    running_state: dict,
) -> StandardCombineInput:

    # Registered fallback for format-conversion tests and examples.

    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.standard import StandardCombineInput

    return StandardCombineInput(
        hidden_states=runner_output.hidden_states,
    )

290	    running_state["down_config"] = down_config
291	    running_state["down_moe_use_tma"] = down_moe_use_tma
292	
293	    return TritonRunnerInput(
294	        hidden_states=hidden_states,
295	        topk_weights=topk_output.topk_weights,
296	        topk_ids=topk_output.topk_ids,
297	        sorted_token_ids=sorted_token_ids,
298	        expert_ids=expert_ids,
299	        num_tokens_post_padded=num_tokens_post_padded,
300	    )
301	
302	
303	@register_post_permute("triton", "standard")
304	def post_permute_triton_to_standard(
305	    runner_output: TritonRunnerOutput,
306	    quant_info: TritonMoeQuantInfo,
307	    runner_config: MoeRunnerConfig,
308	    running_state: dict,
309	) -> StandardCombineInput:
310	
311	    # Registered fallback for format-conversion tests and examples.
312	
313	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.standard import StandardCombineInput
314	
315	    return StandardCombineInput(
316	        hidden_states=runner_output.hidden_states,
317	    )
318

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	import functools
4	import json
5	import logging
6	import os
7	from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
8	
9	import torch
10	import triton
11	
12	from sglang.srt.server_args import get_global_server_args
13	from sglang.srt.utils import get_device_name, is_hip
14	
15	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
16	_is_hip = is_hip()
17	_LOW_SMEM_FP8_DEFAULT_CUTOFF_BYTES = 128 * 1024
18	
19	
20	@functools.lru_cache(maxsize=None)
21	def _get_cuda_shared_memory_per_block_optin() -> Optional[int]:
22	    if _is_hip or not torch.cuda.is_available():
23	        return None
24	    try:
25	        props = torch.cuda.get_device_properties(torch.cuda.current_device())
26	    except (AssertionError, RuntimeError):
27	        return None
28	    return getattr(props, "shared_memory_per_block_optin", None)
29	
30	
31	def _use_low_smem_fp8_default() -> bool:
32	    smem_limit = _get_cuda_shared_memory_per_block_optin()
33	    return smem_limit is not None and smem_limit < _LOW_SMEM_FP8_DEFAULT_CUTOFF_BYTES
34	
35	
36	def get_config_file_name(
37	    E: int,
38	    N: int,
39	    dtype: Optional[str],
40	    block_shape: Optional[int] = None,
41	    per_channel_quant: bool = False,
42	    down_moe: bool = False,
43	) -> str:
44	    device_name = get_device_name().replace(" ", "_")
45	    dtype_selector = "" if not dtype else f",dtype={dtype}"
46	    block_shape_selector = (
47	        "" if not block_shape or not all(block_shape) else f",block_shape={block_shape}"
48	    )
49	    per_channel_quant_selector = ",per_channel_quant=True" if per_channel_quant else ""
50	    down_moe_selector = "_down" if down_moe else ""
51	    return f"E={E},N={N},device_name={device_name}{dtype_selector}{block_shape_selector}{per_channel_quant_selector}{down_moe_selector}.json"
52	
53	
54	@functools.lru_cache
55	def get_moe_configs(
56	    E: int,
57	    N: int,
58	    dtype: Optional[str],
59	    block_n: Optional[int] = 0,
60	    block_k: Optional[int] = 0,
61	    per_channel_quant: bool = False,
62	    down_moe: bool = False,
63	) -> Optional[Dict[int, Any]]:
64	    """
65	    Return optimized configurations for the fused MoE kernel.
66	
67	    The return value will be a dictionary that maps an irregular grid of
68	    batch sizes to configurations of the fused_moe kernel. To evaluate the
69	    kernel on a given batch size bs, the closest batch size in the grid should
70	    be picked and the associated configuration chosen to invoke the kernel.
71	    """
72	    if get_global_server_args().enable_deterministic_inference:
73	        logger.warning(
74	            "Deterministic inference is enabled, using default MoE kernel config."
75	        )
76	        return None
77	
78	    # First look up if an optimized configuration is available in the configs
79	    # directory
80	    json_file_name = get_config_file_name(
81	        E,
82	        N,
83	        dtype,
84	        [block_n, block_k],
85	        per_channel_quant,
86	        down_moe=down_moe,
87	    )
88	
89	    # We found that using the fused_moe_kernel config from Triton 3.1.0 with Triton 3.2.0 results in negative performance gains,
90	    # so we also include the Triton version as a key for finding the fused_moe_kernel config to achieve the best performance.
91	    config_dir = os.environ.get(
92	        "SGLANG_MOE_CONFIG_DIR", os.path.dirname(os.path.realpath(__file__))
93	    )
94	
95	    triton_version = triton.__version__
96	    version_dir = f"triton_{triton_version.replace('.', '_')}"
97	    config_file_path = os.path.join(
98	        config_dir,
99	        "configs",
100	        version_dir,
101	        json_file_name,
102	    )
103	    if os.path.exists(config_file_path):
104	        with open(config_file_path) as f:
105	            # Please note that although we find the config files, performance might still be suboptimal.
106	            # This is because the tuning environment might differ from your current environment.
107	            # For example, updating the Triton version might cause all old configs to become suboptimal.
108	            # To achieve the best performance, consider re-tuning the Triton fused MOE kernel in your environment.
109	            # For the tuning method, refer to: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/tree/main/benchmark/kernels/fused_moe_triton
110	            logger.info(f"Using MoE kernel config from {config_file_path}.")
111	            # If a configuration has been found, return it
112	            return {int(key): val for key, val in json.load(f).items()}
113	
114	    # Discover available triton config dirs on disk and search newest-first.
115	    configs_root = os.path.join(config_dir, "configs")
116	    available_versions = sorted(
117	        (
118	            d.removeprefix("triton_").replace("_", ".")
119	            for d in os.listdir(configs_root)
120	            if d.startswith("triton_")
121	        ),
122	        key=lambda v: tuple(int(x) for x in v.split(".")),
123	        reverse=True,
124	    )
125	
126	    for try_triton_version in available_versions:
127	        if try_triton_version == triton_version:
128	            continue
129	        try_config_file_path = os.path.join(
130	            configs_root,
131	            f"triton_{try_triton_version.replace('.', '_')}",
132	            json_file_name,
133	        )
134	        if os.path.exists(try_config_file_path):
135	            with open(try_config_file_path) as f:
136	                logger.warning(
137	                    f"Config file not found at {config_file_path}. Fallback to triton version {try_triton_version} and use MoE kernel config from {try_config_file_path}. Performance might be sub-optimal!",
138	                )
139	                # If a configuration has been found, return it
140	                return {int(key): val for key, val in json.load(f).items()}
141	
142	    # If no optimized configuration is available, we will use the default configuration when down_moe is False
143	    # When down_moe is True, we will try to use the config for down_moe=False
144	    if down_moe:
145	        logger.warning(
146	            (
147	                "Using MoE kernel config with down_moe=False. Performance might be sub-optimal! "
148	                "Config file not found at %s, you can create them with https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/tree/main/benchmark/kernels/fused_moe_triton"
149	            ),
150	            config_file_path,
151	        )
152	    else:
153	        logger.warning(
154	            (
155	                "Using default MoE kernel config. Performance might be sub-optimal! "
156	                "Config file not found at %s, you can create them with https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/tree/main/benchmark/kernels/fused_moe_triton"
157	            ),
158	            config_file_path,
159	        )
160	    return None
161

163	def get_default_config(
164	    M: int,
165	    E: int,
166	    N: int,
167	    K: int,
168	    topk: int,
169	    dtype: Optional[str],
170	    is_marlin: bool,
171	    block_shape: Optional[List[int]] = None,
172	) -> Dict[str, int]:
173	    if get_global_server_args().enable_deterministic_inference:
174	        config = {
175	            "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 64,
176	            "BLOCK_SIZE_N": 64,
177	            "BLOCK_SIZE_K": 32,
178	            "GROUP_SIZE_M": 8,
179	        }
180	        return config
181	    if dtype == "fp8_w8a8":
182	        if block_shape is None:
183	            if _use_low_smem_fp8_default():
184	                config = {
185	                    "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 32,
186	                    "BLOCK_SIZE_N": 64,
187	                    "BLOCK_SIZE_K": 256,
188	                    "GROUP_SIZE_M": 1,
189	                    "num_warps": 4,
190	                    "num_stages": 4,
191	                }
192	                if M > E:
193	                    config = {
194	                        "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 64,
195	                        "BLOCK_SIZE_N": 128,
196	                        "BLOCK_SIZE_K": 256,
197	                        "GROUP_SIZE_M": 64,
198	                        "num_warps": 4,
199	                        "num_stages": 2,
200	                    }
201	            else:
202	                config = {
203	                    "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 128,
204	                    "BLOCK_SIZE_N": 256,
205	                    "BLOCK_SIZE_K": 128,
206	                    "GROUP_SIZE_M": 32,
207	                    "num_warps": 8,
208	                    "num_stages": 2 if _is_hip else 4,
209	                }
210	                if M <= E:
211	                    config = {
212	                        "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 64,
213	                        "BLOCK_SIZE_N": 128,
214	                        "BLOCK_SIZE_K": 128,
215	                        "GROUP_SIZE_M": 1,
216	                        "num_warps": 4,
217	                        "num_stages": 2 if _is_hip else 4,
218	                    }
219	        else:
220	            # Block-wise quant: BLOCK_SIZE_K must be divisible by block_shape[1]
221	            config = {
222	                "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 64,
223	                "BLOCK_SIZE_N": block_shape[0],
224	                "BLOCK_SIZE_K": block_shape[1],
225	                "GROUP_SIZE_M": 32,
226	                "num_warps": 4,
227	                "num_stages": 2 if _is_hip else 3,
228	            }
229	    else:
230	        config = {
231	            "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 64,
232	            "BLOCK_SIZE_N": 64,
233	            "BLOCK_SIZE_K": 32,
234	            "GROUP_SIZE_M": 8,
235	        }
236	        # A heuristic: fused marlin works faster with this config for small M
237	        if M <= E or (is_marlin and M <= 32):
238	            config = {
239	                "BLOCK_SIZE_M": 16,
240	                "BLOCK_SIZE_N": 32,
241	                "BLOCK_SIZE_K": 64,
242	                "GROUP_SIZE_M": 1,
243	            }
244	    return config
245	
246	
247	def try_get_optimal_moe_config(
248	    w1_shape: Tuple[int, ...],
249	    w2_shape: Tuple[int, ...],
250	    top_k: int,
251	    dtype: Optional[str],
252	    M: int,
253	    is_marlin: bool = False,
254	    block_shape: Optional[List[int]] = None,
255	    per_channel_quant: bool = False,
256	    return_down_config: bool = False,
257	):
258	    from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_utils import get_config
259	
260	    down_config = None
261	    max_block_m = None
262	    override_config = get_config()
263	    if override_config:
264	        config = override_config
265	    else:
266	        # First try to load optimal config from the file
267	        E, _, N = w2_shape
268	        block_n = block_shape[0] if block_shape else 0
269	        block_k = block_shape[1] if block_shape else 0
270	        configs = get_moe_configs(
271	            E,
272	            N,
273	            dtype,
274	            block_n,
275	            block_k,
276	            per_channel_quant=per_channel_quant,
277	            down_moe=False,
278	        )
279	
280	        if configs:
281	            # If an optimal configuration map has been found, look up the
282	            # optimal config
283	            config = configs[min(configs.keys(), key=lambda x: abs(x - M))]
284	        else:
285	            # Else use the default config
286	            config = get_default_config(
287	                M, E, N, w1_shape[2], top_k, dtype, is_marlin, block_shape
288	            )
289	        if return_down_config:
290	            down_configs = get_moe_configs(
291	                E,
292	                N,
293	                dtype,
294	                block_n,
295	                block_k,
296	                per_channel_quant=per_channel_quant,
297	                down_moe=True,
298	            )
299	            if down_configs:
300	                down_config = down_configs[
301	                    min(down_configs.keys(), key=lambda x: abs(x - M))
302	                ]
303	                down_config = dict(**down_config)
304	                max_block_m = max(
305	                    [cfg["BLOCK_SIZE_M"] for cfg in down_configs.values()]
306	                )
307	    if return_down_config:
308	        if (
309	            down_config is not None
310	            and config["BLOCK_SIZE_M"] != down_config["BLOCK_SIZE_M"]
311	        ):
312	            # Both kernels share one moe_align_block_size sort, so the down
313	            # config must use the up config's BLOCK_SIZE_M.
314	            logger.warning_once(
315	                "down_moe config BLOCK_SIZE_M=%d does not match up config "
316	                "BLOCK_SIZE_M=%d at M=%d; overriding down BLOCK_SIZE_M to match.",
317	                down_config["BLOCK_SIZE_M"],
318	                config["BLOCK_SIZE_M"],
319	                M,
320	            )
321	            down_config["BLOCK_SIZE_M"] = config["BLOCK_SIZE_M"]
322	        return config, (down_config, max_block_m)
323	    return config
324	
325	
326	def get_config_dtype_str(
327	    dtype: torch.dtype,
328	    use_int8_w8a16: Optional[bool] = False,
329	    use_int4_w4a16: Optional[bool] = False,
330	    use_fp8_w8a8: Optional[bool] = False,
331	    use_int8_w8a8: Optional[bool] = False,
332	):
333	    if use_fp8_w8a8:
334	        return "fp8_w8a8"
335	    elif use_int8_w8a8:
336	        return "int8_w8a8"
337	    elif use_int4_w4a16:
338	        return "int4_w4a16"
339	    elif use_int8_w8a16:
340	        return "int8_w8a16"
341	    elif dtype == torch.float:
342	        # avoiding cases where kernel fails when float32 MoE
343	        # use fp16/bfloat16 configs
344	        return "float32"
345	    return None
